docs.title: Purchasing Tips
docs.text:
1. Match tractor power to implement requirements — every tool has a minimum HP requirement. Undersized tractors work slowly; oversized tractors waste fuel.
  2. Consider fuel efficiency — Fendt tractors generally consume less fuel per HP/hour than competitors.
  3. Speed matters — a 50 km/h tractor covers fields faster than a 40 km/h model, saving real time on large maps.
  4. Don't overbuy — start with a medium tractor (140–150 HP) and a mid-range combine. Upgrade as your operation grows.
  5. Used vehicles — check the used vehicle dealer regularly for substantial discounts on older models.
  6. Lease before you buy — leasing a vehicle for a single contract is often cheaper than purchasing for infrequent use.

Data source: Farming Simulator Wiki 1.0

docs.title: About the Game
docs.text: Fields of Mistria is a farming simulation RPG developed by NPC Studio, released in August 2024 via Early Access on Steam. Set in a charming pastoral town recovering from a mysterious earthquake, players inherit a run-down farm and work to restore both the land and the nearby village.

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text: Feature Details 🎮 Genre Farming Sim / RPG / Life Sim 👥 Mode Single-player 🏭 Developer NPC Studio 📅 Release August 2024 (Early Access) 🖥️ Platform PC (Steam)

docs.title: 🪄 Magic & Skills
docs.text: Unlike traditional farming sims, Fields of Mistria introduces a magic system that evolves alongside your farming skills. Players learn spells tied to seasonal elements — water magic for irrigating crops, earth magic for tilling, and fire magic for smithing. The magic system ties directly into skill progression, with higher levels unlocking more powerful enchantments for tools and crops.

docs.title: Skill Categories
docs.text:
• 🌱 Farming — Plant, water, and harvest crops; magic-enhanced yields
  • ⛏️ Mining — Explore the mines beneath Mistria, collect ores and gems
  • 🎣 Fishing — Catch freshwater and ocean fish in various biomes
  • 🌿 Foraging — Gather wild ingredients and discover rare herbs
  • 🧙 Magic — Unlock and upgrade spells through practice and quests

docs.title: 🏘️ Town & NPCs
docs.text:
Mistria is home to a cast of fully voiced NPCs with deep relationship mechanics. Each villager has daily routines, seasonal events, and personal story arcs tied to the town's recovery. Building friendships unlocks new spells, recipes, and story progression.

Tip: Spend your first few days clearing only enough land to plant a small crop patch. Use the rest of your energy exploring town and talking to villagers — early relationships unlock important tool upgrades and magic abilities faster than rushing farm expansion.

docs.title: 🐄 Fields of Mistria — 动物与宠物终极攻略
docs.text: 畜牧业是 Mistria 中后期稳定的日收入来源。与作物不同，动物不需要每天重新种植，且产品质量随好感度线性提升。合理配置畜棚是实现财务自由的关键。

docs.title: 🐔 可购买动物全览
docs.text:
动物 购买价 建筑 产出 基础售价 每日利润 产出间隔 🐔 鸡 800g 鸡舍 鸡蛋🥚 50g 38g 每日 🦆 鸭 2000g 鸡舍 (升级) 鸭蛋🥚 80g 48g 每日 🐄 牛 3000g 畜棚 牛奶🥛 100g 70g 每日 🐑 羊 4000g 畜棚 (升级) 羊毛🧶 150g 55g 每 2 天 🐐 山羊 5000g 畜棚 (大) 羊奶🥛 180g 125g 每日 🐇 兔子 3000g 鸡舍 (大) 兔毛🧶 200g 50g 每 3 天 🦙 羊驼 8000g 畜棚 (大) 羊驼毛🧶 280g 110g 每 2 天 🐖 猪 12000g 畜棚 (豪华) 松露🍄 350g 175g 每日 (晴天)

Tip: 猪的日利润最高（175g），但雨天不出松露。平均每月雨天 6~8 天，实际日利润约 130g。山羊才是稳定的日利润之王——不论天气，每日稳定 125g。

docs.title: ❤️ 好感度系统与解锁
docs.text:
好感度等级 所需天数 (每日摸+喂) 解锁效果 ❤️ 1 颗心 0~3 天 基础品质产出 ❤️❤️ 2 颗心 4~7 天 小型畜棚自动喂食器解锁 ❤️❤️❤️ 3 颗心 8~12 天 银星品质产出 (1.25× 售价) ❤️❤️❤️❤️ 4 颗心 13~18 天 大型畜棚自动喂食器 + 动物参加节日 ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️ 5 颗心 19~25 天 金星品质产出 (1.5× 售价) ⭐ 满好感 26~35 天 铱星品质产出 (2× 售价) + 特殊产品

Tip: 满好感一只动物约需 30 天。每天抚摸是最高效的方式——同样花 2 秒，收益是喂食的 2 倍。开局 4 只鸡只需 10 秒操作，日收入增加 150g+。

docs.title: 🐾 宠物系统
docs.text:
宠物 获取方式 特殊能力 评价 🐱 猫 宠物店 2000g 每日随机赠送礼物（概率出现稀有鱼/宝石） 🥇 实用 🐶 狗 宠物店 2000g 牧羊：自动将放牧动物赶回棚内 🥇 懒人必备 🦊 狐狸 森林事件触发 寻找隐藏的采集物品（夜晚加成） 🥈 采集流 🐦 猫头鹰 完成法师塔任务 夜间捕鼠保护储存的谷物 🥈 仓库流 🐢 乌龟 海滩 4000g 水池自动收集鱼塘产物 🥉 钓鱼流

宠物好感度升级（满 5 心后能力翻倍）： - 猫：礼物稀有度提升，可能送宝石 - 狗：牧羊范围从 5 格扩大至 15 格 - 狐狸：采集物标记显示在小地图上

docs.title: 🏠 畜棚升级与自动喂食器
docs.text:
建筑 容量 价格/材料 自动喂食 基础鸡舍 4 2000g + 40木+20石 ❌ 大型鸡舍 8 6000g + 60木+40石+5铁锭 ✅ 豪华鸡舍 12 12000g + 10金锭+8铁锭+80木 ✅ 基础畜棚 4 3000g + 50木+30石 ❌ 大型畜棚 8 8000g + 80木+50石+8铁锭 ✅ 豪华畜棚 12 18000g + 15金锭+10铁锭+100木+5丝 ✅

自动喂食器投资回报： 自动喂食器 ≈ 每日节省 3 分钟放干草时间。按每小时 300g 的机会成本计算，大型畜棚的 6000g 升级费约 13 天回本。建议在购买第 3 只动物前完成升级。

docs.title: ⭐ 产品质量等级与提升
docs.text:
品质 售价倍率 解锁要求 提升方法 普通 ⚪ 1.0× 默认 — 银星 ⭐ 1.25× 3 心好感 每日抚摸 + 牧草放牧 金星 ⭐⭐ 1.5× 5 心好感 高级饲料 + 魔法草籽 铱星 ⭐⭐⭐ 2.0× 满好感 + 魔法项圈 完成魔法塔任务后购买项圈

铱星策略： 1 只铱星山羊日产羊奶 360g（180×2），相当于 3 只普通鸡的总产出。集中资源养 3 只高好感山羊 > 养 12 只普通鸡。建议队伍配置：2 牛（奶酪原料）+ 4 山羊（现金流）+ 2 羊驼（高级布料）。

docs.title: ❄️ 季节策略与过冬装备
docs.text:
季节 放牧可行？ 注意事项 🌸 春 ✅ 放牧 种植牧草种子，1 格牧草养 1 只动物 ☀️ 夏 ✅ 放牧 牧草生长最快，囤积干草（割草机） 🍂 秋 ✅ 放牧至 20 号 最后 8 天开始囤干草过冬 ❄️ 冬 ❌ 室内 每日消耗 2 捆干草/动物，需储备 50+ 捆

冬季干草预算： 8 只动物 × 2 干草/天 × 28 天 = 448 捆干草。秋季最后两周用镰刀收割牧草（每刀 3~5 捆），每保留 1 块牧草地 = 10~15 捆干草库存。

Tip: 冬季动物不产出？错！室内动物冬季正常产出，只是不能放牧。好感度 3 心以上的动物冬季也能产出银星品质。冬天反而是全力爬好感度的最佳时机——每天只需进屋抚摸，不耽误矿洞时间。

docs.title: 📊 畜牧 vs 种植 利润对比
docs.text:
对比维度 🌱 种植 (20 格) 🐄 畜牧 (4 山羊) 日均收入 180~250g (季节依赖) 500g (稳定) 前期投入 200~800g 种子 12000g + 畜棚 每日劳动 浇水 20 次 2 分钟 回本周期 4~10 天 24 天 升级空间 魔法增强 铱星 ×2 倍

结论： 春季种植积累资本→夏季扩建畜棚→秋季买山羊→冬季靠畜牧现金流+温室草莓烹饪，双线并行利润最大化。

Data source: Fields of Mistria v0.8+ (Early Access)

docs.title: 🍳 Fields of Mistria — 烹饪深度攻略与食谱大全
docs.text: 烹饪是 Mistria 中后期最重要的能量管理工具和属性增益来源。厨房升级后，你可以将农作物转化为高性价比料理，其体力/金币转换效率远超直接卖原料。

docs.title: 🏠 厨房升级与解锁
docs.text:
等级 解锁条件 花费 解锁内容 基础厨房 房屋升级 Lv.2（木屋→农舍） 3000g + 50 木头 基础炉灶、2 个烹饪槽 中级厨房 城镇等级 B 8000g + 80 石头 + 5 铁锭 烤箱、发酵桶、4 槽位 高级厨房 城镇等级 A 18000g + 10 金锭 + 3 神秘宝石 魔法炉（双倍产出概率+15%）

Tip: 中级厨房是性价比最高的投资——发酵桶让你可以批量制作能量料理，采矿恢复效率直接翻倍。

docs.title: 体力恢复类
docs.text: 料理 ⭐ 稀有度 材料 体力 HP 成本 售价 利润 🥗 田园沙拉 普通 生菜×1 + 番茄×1 45 30 20g 110g 90g 🍲 蔬菜浓汤 普通 胡萝卜×2 + 土豆×1 60 40 35g 160g 125g 🥟 蘑菇馅饼 稀有 蘑菇×2 + 面粉×1 + 鸡蛋×1 90 60 55g 250g 195g 🍝 奶油意面 稀有 小麦×2 + 牛奶×1 + 奶酪×1 110 80 70g 320g 250g 🥩 烤肉拼盘 史诗 熟肉×1 + 土豆×2 + 洋葱×1 160 120 120g 480g 360g 🍰 丰收蛋糕 传说 南瓜×1 + 鸡蛋×2 + 蜂蜜×1 + 奶油×1 220 180 180g 750g 570g

docs.title: 属性增益类
docs.text:
料理 增益效果 持续时间 材料 体力恢复 🌶️ 辣炖菜 +3 采矿, +2 攻击 5min 辣椒×2 + 肉×1 + 番茄×1 80 🐟 烤鱼套餐 +4 钓鱼, +1 速度 5min 鱼×2 + 柠檬×1 + 黄油×1 70 🧊 冰镇果饮 +2 能量恢复/秒 3min 蓝莓×3 + 蜂蜜×1 + 冰块×1 50 🍄 魔力浓汤 +20% 魔法伤害 4min 魔法蘑菇×1 + 牛奶×2 + 糖×1 100 🥊 战士餐 +5 攻击, +3 防御 6min 肉×3 + 鸡蛋×2 + 辣椒×1 130 🦐 海鲜盛宴 +3 运气, +2 钓鱼 6min 虾×2 + 蛤蜊×3 + 柠檬×1 + 黄油×1 150

Tip: 增益料理的持续时间不叠加，但吃新料理会刷新计时。进矿洞前吃辣炖菜，战斗前补战士餐——两个增益可共存。

docs.title: 🎯 场景最佳菜品推荐
docs.text: 场景 🥇 最佳料理 理由 ⛏️ 深层采矿 蘑菇馅饼 90 体力/55g 成本，体力成本比 1.64，采矿 20 层需 8~10 个 🎣 钓鱼马拉松 烤鱼套餐 +4 钓鱼可将铜鱼竿等效为铁鱼竿，配合 buff 可钓传说鱼 ⚔️  Boss 战 战士餐 + 魔力浓汤 6 分钟双 buff 覆盖整个 Golem Guardian 战斗 💰 纯利润线 丰收蛋糕 成本 180g → 售价 750g，净利 570g，比直接卖南瓜高 120% 🌾 日常农作 田园沙拉 45 体力仅 20g 成本，体力/g 效率全表最高（2.25） 🧪 冲技能等级 奶油意面 经验值最高，110 体力 + 250g 利润，技能升级与赚钱兼得

docs.title: 📊 体力-利润转换链
docs.text:
路线 投入食材 步骤 总利润 体力/g 推荐度 直接卖南瓜 南瓜×1 无处理 150g 0.50 ⭐ 南瓜→丰收蛋糕 南瓜+蛋×2+蜂蜜+奶油 厨房加工 +420g 1.22 ⭐⭐⭐ 小麦→面粉→奶油意面 小麦×2+牛奶+奶酪 磨粉→烹饪 +250g 1.57 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 番茄+生菜→沙拉 番茄+生菜 直烹 +90g 2.25 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

收益公式： 每份料理净利 = 售价 − 食材机会成本。沙拉看似单价低，但食材成本仅 20g，体力产出 45，是体力转化效率之王。

docs.title: 🌸 季节食材储备计划
docs.text:
季节 必囤食材 用途 建议储备量 🌸 春 生菜、番茄、胡萝卜、土豆 沙拉/浓汤（全年采矿口粮） 各 50+ ☀️ 夏 辣椒、蓝莓、玉米、小麦 辣炖菜/冰饮/面粉原料 辣椒 30+，小麦 60+ 🍂 秋 南瓜、洋葱、蘑菇 丰收蛋糕/奶油意面（冬季主力） 南瓜 40+，蘑菇 30+ ❄️ 冬 囤货消耗期 + 温室大棚 用秋季库存做高利润料理 无新产，靠前季库存

冬季策略： 秋季囤 40 个南瓜 + 30 个蘑菇，冬季每日生产丰收蛋糕（+570g/个）和奶油意面（+250g/个）。配合温室种植草莓（每 4 天成熟），冬季日均料理利润可达 2000g+。

docs.title: 🧮 烹饪技能专精路线
docs.text:
专精名称 效果 解锁要求 优先级 食材大师 所有料理体力恢复 +15% 烹饪 10 道料理 🥇 第一优先 双倍烹饪 15% 概率一次出两份 烹饪 30 道料理 🥇 美食家 属性增益持续时间 +50% 烹饪 50 道料理 🥈 利润嗅觉 料理售价 +20% 城镇等级 A 🥈 魔法烹饪 可制作魔法料理（带特殊特效） 完成法师塔任务 🥉

Tip: 开局先解锁「食材大师」——所有料理多 15% 体力意味着进矿洞少带 2 个菜，等于多出 6 格背包。

Data source: Fields of Mistria v0.8+ (Early Access), 实测数据

docs.title: ⚒️ Fields of Mistria — 工匠系统与锻造攻略
docs.text: 工匠加工是 Mistria 财富积累的核心引擎。一台加工机可将作物价值提升 150%~250%，但设备顺序和配方选择决定了你的资金周转效率。

docs.title: 🛠️ 工匠台解锁顺序
docs.text:
# 设备 解锁条件 材料 功能 1 基础工作台 初始 10木+5石 基础工具/栅栏 2 🔥 熔炉 任务：修复矿井 20石+10铜矿 矿石→金属锭 3 🔨 铁砧 获得 2 铁锭 30石+5铁锭 武器/工具升级 4 🧵 织布机 获得羊毛 40木+10铁锭 羊毛→布料(160g) 5 🪡 纺车 织布机+ 30木+5铜锭 布料→丝绸(320g) 6 🫙 腌菜缸 城镇等级 D 50石+10铜锭+5粘土 蔬菜→腌菜(1.8×) 7 🍷 酿酒桶 城镇 C 60木+15铜+10铁 作物→果酒(2.5×) 8 🍯 蜂箱 城镇 C 40木+5铁+花 花→蜂蜜(200g+) 9 ✨ 魔法工坊 完成法师塔任务 8金锭+5神秘宝石 附魔/魔法装备

Tip: 熔炉第一优先——没有金属锭就无法升级工具，无法搭建后续设备。第一周目标就是攒够 20 石头造熔炉。

docs.title: 🏭 工匠机数学：投入→产出→利润
果酒 vs 腌菜 vs 果酱
docs.text:
原料 售价 🫙 腌菜(1.8×) 时间 日利 🍷 果酒(2.5×) 时间 日利 南瓜 150g 270g 2天 60g 375g 4天 56g 草莓 85g 153g 1天 68g 212g 3天 42g 西瓜 160g 288g 2天 64g 400g 4天 60g 番茄 60g 108g 1天 48g 150g 2天 45g

结论：腌菜胜在周转快，果酒胜在单次毛利高。 前期缺设备时优先腌菜缸（1 天回本）。后期仓库满了再做果酒。

docs.title: 蜂蜜与丝绸
docs.text:
机器 原料 产出 售价 加工时间 日利润 蜂箱 花（春/夏/秋可放置） 季节蜂蜜 200~350g 3天 67~117g 纺车 布料×1 丝绸 320g 1天 160g 织布机 羊毛×2 布料 160g 1天 80g

蜂蜜策略： 春天蓝花蜜 200g → 夏日向日葵蜜 280g → 秋季魔法花蜜 350g。蜂箱放置在大量种植区旁，3 天收一次。推荐 4 个蜂箱起手，不计人力日利润 400g+。

docs.title: 🧪 最佳工匠路线决策树
docs.text:
农作物
├── 高价值单次作物（西瓜/南瓜）
│   └── 🍷 果酒（长期陈酿，等 4 天卖高价）
├── 低价值快速作物（番茄/胡萝卜）
│   └── 🫙 腌菜（1 天快速周转，资金不断）
├── 再生作物（草莓/蓝莓/玉米）
│   ├── 🫙 腌菜（单次采 1 天回本→再投）
│   └── 🍯 或保留鲜食（玉米→鸡饲料）
└── 花卉
    └── 🍯 蜂箱（3 天出蜂蜜，零人工成本）

资金效率公式： 日利润 = (加工售价 − 原料机会成本) ÷ 加工天数。前期资金紧张时选腌菜（高日利润），后期资金充裕时选果酒（高总利润）。

docs.title: ✨ 附魔系统：魔法工具升级
docs.text:
魔法工坊解锁后，可使用神秘宝石对工具和武器进行附魔。

工具 附魔效果 需要材料 推荐度 ⛏️ 锄头 范围+1 / 消耗能量-25% 3 神秘宝石 🥇 🪓 斧头 硬木掉落率+50% / 速度+1 3 神秘宝石 🥇 💧 水壶 范围+1 / 浇灌面积扇形 3 神秘宝石 🥇 ⚔️ 剑 吸血3% / 暴击率+10% / 元素伤害 5 神秘宝石 🥈 🪚 镰刀 收割范围+1 / 干草掉落+50% 3 神秘宝石 🥈 ⛏️ 镐 采矿速度+2 / 双倍矿石概率+15% 3 神秘宝石 🥉

附魔顺序： 锄头 > 水壶 > 斧头 > 剑 > 镰刀 > 镐。锄头和水壶的范围+1 直接减少每日农作时间 40%，是时间管理的最佳投资。

Tip: 神秘宝石主要来自矿井 11~20 层的宝石矿脉、Boss 掉落和钓鱼宝箱。建议前 10 个附魔工具，多余的出售（每个 800g）。

docs.title: 🗺️ 稀有材料获取指南
docs.text: 材料 用途 获取方式 稀有度 神秘宝石 附魔 矿井11~20层(15%) / 宝箱(5%) ⭐⭐⭐ 魔法蘑菇 料理/附魔 矿井15~20层(日刷新) ⭐⭐⭐ 古代种子 温室特殊作物 远古遗迹挖掘(3%) / 宝箱(2%) ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 龙鳞矿 传说武器 矿井20层 Boss(25%) ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 丝线 丝绸/高级布料 纺车加工(布料→丝绸) ⭐⭐ 硬木 高级建筑 神秘森林(每日刷新, 斧头Lv.3+) ⭐⭐ 粘土 腌菜缸/建筑 锄地(15%) / 矿洞1~5层 ⭐

docs.title: 🌳 工匠技能树
docs.text:
技能 等级 效果 优先级 高效加工 Lv.3 工匠机时间 -15% 🥇 双倍产出 Lv.5 10% 概率双份 🥇 品质提升 Lv.7 加工品品质+1 级 🥈 批量生产 Lv.9 单次可投入 2 份 🥈 魔法工匠 Lv.10 25% 概率出魔法版(+50%售价) 🥉 附魔大师 Lv.12 附魔 -1 宝石 🥉

升级路线： Lv.3 高效加工 → Lv.5 双倍产出 → Lv.7 品质提升 → Lv.10 魔法工匠。加工 200+ 件冲等级。

Tip: 不要忽略蜂箱——蜂箱加工不消耗手艺等级（白送经验），3 天产一次蜂蜜 = 每 3 天白嫖 30~50 经验。长期挂 4 个，月赚 2400g + 600+ 经验。

Data source: Fields of Mistria v0.8+ (Early Access)

docs.title: Fields of Mistria — Crop Profit Guide
docs.text:
Maximize your farm's profitability in Fields of Mistria with this comprehensive crop profit guide. The table below covers every spring, summer, and fall crop including seed price, growth time, sell price, and profit per day.

Note: Prices shown are base values. Crop quality, ranching perks, and festival bonuses can increase sell prices significantly.

docs.title: Quick Tips
docs.text:
• Early game: Plant Carrots (Spring) and Onions (Summer) — cheap and fast-growing for quick cash.
  • Mid game: Invest in Strawberries (Spring) and Cranberries (Fall) — regrowth crops give sustained income.
  • Late game: Watermelons (Summer) and Pumpkins (Fall) have the highest single-harvest profit.
  • Processing: Always run high-volume crops like Tomato, Corn, and Potato through the Preserves Jar for maximum value.
  • Seed Maker: Use on expensive regrowth crops (Strawberry, Cranberry) to save money on replanting.

Data source: Fields of Mistria Wiki 1.0

docs.title: 🎪 Fields of Mistria — 节日庆典与活动攻略
docs.text: Mistria 全年 8 大节日，每个一年仅一次。本攻略涵盖获胜策略与奖励优先级。

docs.title: 📅 全年节日日历
docs.text: 日期 节日 核心奖励 独占？ 春 15 🌸 春季丰收祭 铱星锄头配方 ✅ 春 22 🐣 彩蛋寻宝 彩蛋帽 ✅ 夏 11 ☀️ 烧烤大会 魔法烤炉（15%双倍烹饪） ✅ 夏 20 🐟 钓鱼大赛 铱星鱼竿 ✅ 夏 28 ✨ 星光之夜 星辰灯笼 — 秋 9 🏆 秋季博览会 星之果实（+30体力上限） ✅ 秋 20 🎃 万灵节 金色南瓜（2500g/装饰） — 冬 13 ❄️ 冬季市集 冰霜剑（32~48攻+冰冻） ✅ 冬 25 🎁 星辉节 随机稀有回礼 —

docs.title: 🌸 春 15 — 春季丰收祭
docs.text:
提交 5 件春作物/采集品。评分 = Σ(品质倍率×基础分) + 品类数×3。（铱=3×, 金=2×, 银=1.5×, 普=1×）

推荐配置 得分 铱星草莓+春花+蘑菇+鱼+矿石 ~50（满分） 5×金星不同品类（第一年） ~30

奖励必选：铱星锄头配方——全年仅此一次，错过等一年。日后锄地范围+1，效率提升 40%。

docs.title: 🐣 春 22 — 彩蛋寻宝
docs.text:
9 个彩蛋从 15 个固定点位池抽取。速通路线： 广场花坛→镇长围栏→杂货店后→水井→教堂后→桥底→铁匠屋顶（梯子）→旅店花盆。练习 2 次即可全收集。

Tip: 彩蛋帽唯一外观，错过不可重得。

docs.title: ☀️ 夏 11 — 烧烤大会
docs.text:
提交 1 道料理：美味度 30 + 季节性 20 + 稀有度 20 + 分享性 10 = 满分 80。≥65 夺冠。

配置 得分 铱星烤肉拼盘（夏季食材） 70~75 金星蔬菜浓汤（第一年） 55~60

奖励→魔法烤炉（15%双倍烹饪概率，唯一来源）。

docs.title: 🐟 夏 20 — 钓鱼大赛
docs.text:
限时 5 分钟按总重排名。必胜： 提前囤一条 5kg+ 传说鱼→直接提交。无则去矿洞湖钓虎纹鲶鱼（3~5kg）。

奖励→铱星鱼竿（鱼钩延迟减半，+1 范围）。错过等一年。

docs.title: ✨ 夏 28 — 星光之夜
docs.text: 纯观赏，得星辰灯笼。集 3 年→星光套装（发光地板+星幕墙纸）。纯收藏向，强迫症必拿。

docs.title: 🏆 秋 9 — 秋季博览会（最重要）
docs.text:
提交 9 件不同品类物品。可押注斗鸡/斗羊赢代币。

品类 推荐 品质 品类 推荐 品质 作物 铱星南瓜 ≥金 动物 铱星羊奶 ≥金 料理 丰收蛋糕 ≥金 鱼 传说鱼 稀有 矿石 金锭/宝石 无 采集 秋蘑菇 ≥银 手工 果酒 ≥金 锻造 金锭 无 神秘 魔法蘑菇 任意

💰 代币兑换优先级：星之果实（永久+30 体力上限）> 魔法种子 > 墙饰。 斗鸡技巧：押体重大的。

docs.title: 🎃 秋 20 — 万灵节
docs.text:
3 层迷宫→终点金色南瓜。解法： ①推箱子：左→上→右→下 ②记忆配对：截图每张牌 ③暗光迷宫：沿右墙走。

Tip: 金色南瓜是唯一地面发光装饰，收藏>出售（2500g）。

docs.title: ❄️ 冬 13 — 冬季市集
docs.text:
冰雕赛+雪橇竞速+限定商店。

活动 必胜法 奖励 冰雕 提交钻石/红宝石 冰霜剑（冰冻特效） 雪橇 减速过弯、加速直道 代币

商店： 猫头鹰雕像（+1夜间采集）> 冰晶壁炉 > 暖手宝配方。

docs.title: 🎁 冬 25 — 星辉节
docs.text:
送礼价值决定回礼（60%~80%）。

送礼 回礼期望 铱星钻石（750g） ~500g，可能远古种子 传说鱼（1000g+） ~800g 稀有品 ❌ < 200g 垃圾

底线： 春 15/夏 11/秋 9/冬 13 提供独占功能性物品，必须参加且务必夺冠。其余佛系。

Data source: Fields of Mistria v0.8+ (Early Access)

docs.title: Fields of Mistria Fish Database
docs.text: Welcome to the complete fish database for Fields of Mistria. Whether you are a dedicated angler trying to complete the museum collection, a chef looking for the best ingredients, or a farmer seeking extra income, this guide covers every fish species currently available in the game. Use the tables below to find exactly where and when to catch each fish, along with their base sell prices.

docs.title: Understanding Fishing Mechanics
docs.text: Before diving into the species list, it helps to know the basics. Fishing in Fields of Mistria uses a timing-based minigame. Different fish appear in specific locations, seasons, times of day, and weather conditions. Your fishing level and the quality of your rod also affect what you can catch. Higher-quality fish (Silver, Gold, Iridium) sell for more and are worth more for cooking.

docs.title: Key Terms
docs.text:
• Location: The specific body of water or area where the fish is found.
  • Season: The in-game season(s) the fish is available.
  • Time: The in-game time window when the fish is active.
  • Weather: Some fish only appear in rain, sun, or storms.
  • Sell Price: The base price for a normal-quality fish. Prices increase with quality.

docs.title: Complete Fish List
docs.text: Below is the full database of fish organized by location. Each table includes all relevant catch conditions.

docs.title: Town River & Lake
docs.text:
The river running through the center of town and the small lake near the inn are the most accessible fishing spots for beginners.

Fish Name Season Time Weather Base Sell Price Minnow Spring, Summer, Fall Any Any 15g Carp Spring, Summer, Fall 6AM – 7PM Any 30g Perch Spring, Fall 6AM – 2PM Any 45g Sunfish Summer 9AM – 4PM Sunny 50g Catfish Summer, Fall 6PM – 2AM Rain 80g Rainbow Trout Spring 6AM – 12PM Any 65g Bass Spring, Summer, Fall Any Any 55g Pike Fall 6AM – 9AM, 4PM – 7PM Any 100g Eel Spring, Fall 6PM – 2AM Rain 70g Goldfish Spring, Summer 10AM – 4PM Sunny 120g

docs.title: Mistria Beach & Ocean
docs.text:
The ocean to the south of town offers saltwater species. You will need the Fishing Rod Upgrade from the blacksmith to cast far enough to reach deep water fish.

Fish Name Season Time Weather Base Sell Price Sardine Spring, Summer, Fall 6AM – 6PM Any 40g Herring Spring, Winter 6AM – 2PM Any 50g Flounder Spring, Summer 6AM – 7PM Any 75g Tuna Summer, Fall 10AM – 4PM Sunny 110g Red Snapper Summer, Fall 6AM – 7PM Rain 130g Halibut Spring, Fall 6AM – 11AM, 4PM – 7PM Any 150g Lobster Summer, Fall Any Any 200g Crab Spring, Summer 6AM – 12PM Any 180g Octopus Summer 6PM – 2AM Any 250g Shark Summer 6AM – 9AM, 4PM – 7PM Sunny 350g Sea Turtle Summer, Fall 10AM – 4PM Sunny 400g

docs.title: Mountain Lake
docs.text:
The lake in the northern mountain area is home to cold-water and rare species. Access requires clearing the path north of the farm.

Fish Name Season Time Weather Base Sell Price Largemouth Bass Spring, Summer, Fall 6AM – 7PM Any 60g Walleye Fall, Winter 12PM – 2AM Rain 105g Sturgeon Summer, Winter 6AM – 7PM Any 180g Salmon Fall 6AM – 7PM Any 120g Trout Spring, Summer 6AM – 12PM Any 70g Bluegill Spring, Summer 9AM – 4PM Sunny 45g Lake Catfish Summer, Fall 6PM – 2AM Any 90g Ghost Fish Winter 6PM – 2AM Any 220g Ice Carp Winter 6AM – 7PM Snow 160g Legendary Fish (The Ancient One) Spring 6AM – 9AM Rain 1,000g

docs.title: Secret Fishing Spots
docs.text:
There are a few hidden fishing locations that require specific quests or tools to access. These spots contain unique fish.

Fish Name Location Season Time Weather Base Sell Price Lava Eel Volcanic Cave (floor 10+) Any Any Any 450g Crystal Carp Crystal Caverns Any Any Any 300g Moon Jellyfish Mistria Lake (during Festival of Stars) Fall 28 8PM – 12AM Clear 500g Void Fish Sewers (unlocked after museum donation milestone) Any Any Any 600g

docs.title: Fish Uses
docs.text:
Fish are not just for selling. They have several important uses in Fields of Mistria:

  • Cooking: Many recipes require specific fish. Cooked meals provide energy, health, and temporary buffs.
  • Museum Donations: The museum curator accepts one of each species. Donating all fish unlocks special rewards.
  • Gifting: Some villagers love certain fish. For example, the fisherman NPC loves Catfish and Pike.
  • Fish Ponds: You can raise fish in ponds on your farm. They produce roe, which can be aged and sold for profit.
  • Quests: The town bulletin board occasionally requests specific fish for rewards.

docs.title: Best Fish for Profit
docs.text:
If your goal is to make gold, focus on these high-value fish:

  1. Legendary Fish (The Ancient One) – 1,000g (Spring, Rain, Mountain Lake)
  2. Moon Jellyfish – 500g (Fall 28 only)
  3. Lava Eel – 450g (Volcanic Cave)
  4. Sea Turtle – 400g (Summer/Fall, Beach)
  5. Shark – 350g (Summer, Beach)

For consistent daily income, Catfish (80g) and Red Snapper (130g) are reliable options that are easier to catch.

docs.title: Quick Tips
docs.text:
• Upgrade your rod early: Better rods let you cast farther and catch rarer fish.
  • Use bait: Craft bait from bug meat to reduce bite time and increase catch rate.
  • Check the weather: Rain and snow unlock exclusive species. Always fish during bad weather.
  • Fish at different times: Many fish are only active at dawn, dusk, or night. Set reminders to check each time window.
  • Complete the museum: The rewards for donating all fish include a permanent fishing buff and a unique decoration.
  • Cook before selling: Some fish sell for more when cooked into dishes. Check the recipe book before selling raw fish.
  • Build a fish pond: Once you have a surplus of high-value fish like Sturgeon or Lava Eel, place them in a pond for passive roe income.

docs.title: Your First Day
docs.text: When you arrive at your overgrown farm in Mistria, the first priority is survival. You'll start with basic tools — a watering can, hoe, axe, and pickaxe — and a small patch of arable land.

docs.title: Day 1 Checklist
docs.text:
• [x] Clear weeds and small debris from 6-8 farm tiles
  • [x] Visit the general store in town for starter seeds
  • [x] Plant your first crops and water them
  • [x] Meet at least 3 villagers to start building relationships
  • [x] Check the town notice board for available quests

docs.title: 🌾 First Season Strategy
docs.text: Spring (Season 1) is about building a foundation. Focus on crops with short grow times — turnips and spring greens mature in 4-5 days and provide quick gold to reinvest. Avoid large fields until you have the stamina to water them daily.

docs.title: Recommended Early Crops
docs.text: Crop Grow Time Sell Price Notes Turnip 4 days 60g Fastest turnaround Spring Green 5 days 90g Good early profit Tomato 7 days 120g Regrows after harvest

docs.title: 🧙 Unlocking Magic Early
docs.text:
Magic unlocks around day 5 after you complete your first town quest. To speed this up:

  1. Complete the "Clearing the Path" quest by removing large debris
  2. Talk to Valen, the town elder, after clearing 10 debris tiles
  3. Accept the Spell Font quest to learn your first water spell
  4. Use magic to water crops — it covers a 3×3 area and saves stamina

Tip: Always keep 200-300g in reserve for seed purchases. A common beginner mistake is spending all gold on tool upgrades before securing a steady crop income. Prioritize reinvesting in seeds until you have at least 10 planted tiles producing consistently.

docs.title: Fields of Mistria — NPC Gift Guide & Friendship
docs.text:
Build relationships with the residents of Mistria! This guide covers every NPC's gift preferences, organized by Loved, Liked, Neutral, Disliked, and Hated items.

Friendship Tip: Gifting on a character's birthday gives 3× the usual friendship points. Loved gifts on birthdays are the fastest path to max hearts.

docs.title: 🏠 Fields of Mistria — 房屋升级与装饰完全指南
docs.text: 从破旧小屋到梦幻庄园，Fields of Mistria 的房屋系统提供了 4 个升级等级，每个等级解锁新房间、新功能和装饰槽位。配合完整的家具与装饰系统，你可以打造兼具功能与审美的理想家园。

docs.title: 📐 房屋升级层级
docs.text:
等级 费用 材料需求 新增房间 总房间数 1️⃣ 初始 — — 客厅 + 卧室 + 厨房 3 2️⃣ 升级 2500g 木材×50 + 石材×30 浴室 + 储藏室 5 3️⃣ 扩建 8000g 硬木×40 + 铜锭×20 书房 + 客房 7 4️⃣ 豪宅 25000g 铁锭×30 + 大理石×15 地下室 + 阳光房 + 阁楼 10

💡 Tip: 升级第 2 级之前，优先攒钱升级工具和背包。储藏室在 2 级解锁后才可用 — 这是你第一个真正的批量存储解决方案，尽早解锁能极大减少户外箱子的需求。

docs.title: 功能性家具
docs.text: 家具 功能 获取方式 🛏️ 床 睡眠恢复（等级越高恢复越多） 木工台制作 📦 箱子 物品存储（基础 24 格） 初始配方 🔥 熔炉 矿石熔炼（室内版） 升级解锁 🍳 灶台 烹饪（解锁更多食谱） 厨房自带 🪡 缝纫机 布料/服装制作 任务奖励 📚 书架 技能经验加成 城镇商店

docs.title: 装饰性家具
docs.text:
装饰不影响数值，但影响 House Score（房屋评分） 。评分系统根据房间内的家具数量、稀有度、配色一致性给予分数，达到阈值解锁特殊奖励。

评分阈值 奖励 说明 100 🌟 活力光环 每天起床 +10 能量 250 🌟🌟 好运光环 +5% 钓鱼/采矿暴击 500 🌟🌟🌟 丰收祝福 +10% 作物产量 1000 🏆 大师徽章 专属墙饰 + 成就

docs.title: 储存优先级
docs.text: 按物品类型决定储存位置： - 高周转物品（食材、矿石、木材）→ 靠近对应工作站 - 收藏品（鱼类、文物）→ 等捐赠后再卖，放储藏室深处 - 季节性物品 → 换季时放入储藏室，非当季不占主箱位

docs.title: 围栏类型对比
docs.text: 类型 材料 耐久 美观度 推荐用途 🪵 木栅栏 木材×2 低 ⭐⭐ 初期临时圈地 🪨 石墙 石材×3 中 ⭐⭐⭐ 农场边界主围栏 🏛️ 砖墙 粘土×3 + 石材×2 高 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 住宅区围栏 ✨ 魔法围栏 魔法粉尘×3 + 铁锭×2 ∞ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 终极装饰

docs.title: 路径铺设
docs.text:
路径系统影响行走速度和美观度：

路径 移速加成 材料 解锁 泥土路 0% 免费（锄头） 初始 碎石路 +10% 石材×2 初期 石板路 +15% 石材×5 中后期 魔法砖路 +25% 魔法砖×3 后期

推荐布局： 从家门口→信箱→农场大门铺一条 石板主路，分支到畜棚和温室用 碎石路。

docs.title: 照明与绿化
docs.text:
• 灯笼/火把：每 6 格间距放置一个，防止夜晚怪物刷新在农场内
  • 树木规划：果树至少留 3×3 空间，装饰树 2×2 即可
  • 花坛：蜜蜂箱周围 8 格内种花 → 蜂蜜品质翻倍

docs.title: 🔑 稀有家具获取
docs.text:
家具 来源 稀有度 备注 🖼️ 星辰壁挂 矿洞 40-60 层宝箱 🌟🌟🌟 评分 +25 🕯️ 魔法枝形吊灯 秋季节日奖品 🌟🌟🌟🌟 评分 +40，照亮整个房间 🛋️ 天鹅绒沙发 城镇商店（周六刷新） 🌟🌟🌟 2000g，评分 +20 🪴 会发光的盆栽 魔法森林探索 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 评分 +50，夜光特效 🐟 鱼缸（大） 完成钓鱼图鉴 50% 🌟🌟🌟🌟 放入稀有鱼可额外加分

💡 Tip: 商店家具每天刷新，每天必看。稀有家具经常出现在 周六特卖、节日摊位 和 矿洞宝箱 中。装饰不占背包空间，看到就买。

docs.title: 高效实用布局（80 分 / 5 室）
美观向布局（500+ 分 / 7 室）
docs.text:
将 4 级豪宅的 10 个房间分为：卧室（星空主题）、浴室（自然风格）、厨房（乡村风）、书房（古籍风）、客厅（豪华风）、储藏室（纯功能，无装饰浪费评分）、阳光房（盆栽 + 鱼缸）、地下室（酿酒 + 腌制加工区）。

数据来源：Fields of Mistria Wiki 1.0, game version Early Access 0.8+

docs.title: ⛏️ Fields of Mistria — Mining & Combat Deep Dive
docs.text: Mining in Fields of Mistria is more than an ore run — it's the game's primary combat arena, gear progression pipeline, and mid-game money engine. The mines are gated by story progression and hold 20 floors of increasing danger, each with unique enemies, ores, and loot tables.

docs.title: 🧱 Mine Structure & Progression
docs.text:
Aspect Details Total Floors 20 (unlocked in 5-floor tiers via story milestones) Tier 1 Floors 1–5 (after completing Spring quest "Earthquake Aftermath") Tier 2 Floors 6–10 (after reaching Town Rank B) Tier 3 Floors 11–15 (after restoring the mine cart) Tier 4 Floors 16–20 (endgame, requires Town Rank S) Shafts Random ladder + guaranteed exit at every floor

Tip: Unlike Stardew Valley, there is no elevator in Fields of Mistria. You must clear each floor's threat room to unlock the ladder. Once cleared, the floor stays cleared — you can revisit without fighting again.

docs.title: Floor Composition Table
docs.text: Floors Theme Primary Ores Common Enemies Boss 1–5 Dirt Cavern Copper, Tin Green Slimes, Cave Bats King Slime (F5) 6–10 Stone Depths Iron, Coal Blue Slimes, Stone Golems, Crystal Bats Golem Guardian (F10) 11–15 Magma Core Gold, Rubies Red Slimes, Lava Bats, Magma Golems Magma Warden (F15) 16–20 Abyssal Vault Mythril, Gems Purple Slimes, Shadow Bats, Abyss Golems Void Construct (F20)

docs.title: 👾 Enemy Encyclopedia
docs.text:
Each enemy type has distinct resistances and drop tables. Knowing their weaknesses doubles your clear speed.

Enemy HP Weakness Resists Key Drops 🟢 Green Slime 25 Fire magic None Slime Gel, Healing Vial (10%) 🔵 Blue Slime 45 Earth magic Fire (−20%) Slime Gel, Iron Ore (15%) 🔴 Red Slime 70 Water magic Fire (−40%) Slime Gel, Gold Ore (12%) 🟣 Purple Slime 110 Earth magic All magic (−30%) except Earth Slime Gel, Mythril Ore (8%) 🦇 Cave Bat 20 None None Bat Wing, Copper Ore 💎 Crystal Bat 40 Pickaxe swing All magic (−50%) Bat Wing, Gems (rare) 🌋 Lava Bat 55 Water magic Fire (immune) Bat Wing, Gold Ore 👻 Shadow Bat 75 Light magic Shadow (immune) Bat Wing, Mythril Shard 🪨 Stone Golem 80 Pickaxe (3 hits) Swords (−40%) Stone Blocks, Iron Ore 🔥 Magma Golem 120 Water magic Fire (immune) Stone Blocks, Gold Ore, Coal ⚫ Abyss Golem 180 Earth magic All physical (−25%) Dark Stone, Mythril Bar

Tip: Crystal Bats and Shadow Bats are generally not worth fighting in bulk — their magic resistance makes them take 2× longer to kill. Skip them unless they block the ladder.

docs.title: ⚔️ Gear Progression
docs.text: Your output in the mines is entirely gear-dependent. Don't fight floor 10 with floor 1 equipment.

docs.title: Pickaxe Upgrades
docs.text: Level Cost Effect Unlock Requirement Copper — Starting pick None Iron 500g + 5 Iron Bars 1.5× damage vs rocks Floor 5 clear Gold 1500g + 8 Gold Bars 2× damage, mining speed +3 Floor 10 clear Mythril 5000g + 6 Mythril Bars 3× damage, can break dark stone Floor 15 clear

docs.title: Weapon Progression
docs.text: Weapon Damage How to Get Best For Rusty Sword 4–8 Starting weapon Floors 1–2 only Copper Blade 8–14 Forge (3 Copper Bars) Floors 1–5 Iron Broadsword 16–25 Forge (6 Iron Bars) Floors 5–10 Gold Saber 28–40 Forge (8 Gold Bars + 2 Rubies) Floors 10–15 Mythril Greatsword 45–65 Forge (10 Mythril Bars + Gem Shard) Floors 15–20

docs.title: Armor Tiers
docs.text: Set Defense Set Bonus Required Copper 5 None 10 Copper Bars Iron 12 +15 HP 15 Iron Bars Gold 22 +25 HP, +2 defense 20 Gold Bars Mythril 35 +40 HP, +5 defense, fire resist 25 Mythril Bars

docs.title: Accessory Slot
docs.text:
Unlocked at floor 10. One accessory at a time:

Accessory Effect Drop Source Ruby Ring +15% melee damage Golem Guardian (30%) Sapphire Ring +20% water magic Magma Warden (25%) Emerald Ring +20% earth magic King Slime (30%) Amethyst Ring +15% magic regen Void Construct (20%)

docs.title: 🪄 Magic Combat
docs.text:
Magic is Fields of Mistria's unique combat mechanic — it pulls from a shared mana pool (recharges slowly, or instantly via mana potions).

Spell Cost Effect Best Against 🔥 Fireball 15 MP 30–50 damage, burn DoT 3s Slimes (all colors), Golems 💧 Water Jet 12 MP 20–35 damage, slows enemy Red Slimes, Lava Bats 🌍 Earth Spike 18 MP 40–60 damage, stun 1.5s Blue Slimes, Abyss Golem ✨ Light Burst 25 MP 50–70 damage, AoE Shadow Bats, Purples

Recommended Loadout: - General floors: Fireball (cheap, effective against most enemies) - Floor 6–10: Earth Spike (Golems are the main threat) - Floor 11–15: Water Jet (Lava enemies resist fire) - Floor 16–20: Light Burst (necessary for Shadow enemies)

Tip: Don't spam magic. Use 2–3 Fireballs to soften a group, then mop up with melee. Mana potions cost 250g each at the Adventurer's Guild — use them only on boss floors.

docs.title: King Slime (Floor 5)
docs.text: Stat Value HP 250 Phase 1 Jumps toward you, leaving slime puddles (damage zone) Phase 2 (< 50% HP) Splits into 3 small slimes (each 40 HP) — kill all to win Recommended Gear Copper Armor + Copper Blade Strategy Keep moving in a circle. Fireball from range. When it splits, kill the small slimes ASAP — they have no attack but extend the fight

docs.title: Golem Guardian (Floor 10)
docs.text: Stat Value HP 450 Attacks Ground slam (AoE, slow), Charge (linear), Rock throw (ranged) Weak Spot Back — takes 50% more damage from behind Recommended Gear Iron Gear + Iron Broadsword Strategy Dodge roll through its charge attack to get behind it. Earth Spike stuns it for 3 hits. Never stand still — the slam AoE covers 3 tiles

docs.title: Magma Warden (Floor 15)
docs.text: Stat Value HP 700 Attacks Fire breath (cone, 80 damage), Magma puddle (DoT zone), Tail sweep (180°) Immune Fire magic (0 damage) Recommended Gear Gold Armor + Gold Saber + Sapphire Ring Strategy This fight is a DPS check. Use Water Jet exclusively (4× damage). When it breathes fire, dodge behind it. The magma puddles last 20 seconds — don't trap yourself in a corner

docs.title: Void Construct (Floor 20)
docs.text: Stat Value HP 1200 Attacks Shadow beam (linear, 100 damage), Void orbs (homing, 40 damage each), Summon adds (2 Shadow Bats) Immune Physical (−75%), Shadow (immune) Recommended Gear Full Mythril Gear + Amethyst Ring Strategy The hardest fight in the mines. Use Light Burst exclusively. Kill summoned Shadow Bats instantly (they heal the boss on contact). When Void orbs appear, kite them into walls — they despawn after hitting terrain

docs.title: 💰 Profit Analysis: What to Sell vs. Keep
docs.text:
Item Sell Price Keep? Reason Copper Ore 3g 🗑️ Sell after floor 5 You need ~60 total for upgrades, excess is vendor trash Iron Ore 6g 🔧 Keep Needed for mid-game crafts and all building structures Gold Ore 15g 🔧 Keep Scarce — every bar is needed for tools and gear Mythril Ore 40g 🔧 Keep Extremely rare, never sell Coal 5g 🔧 Keep Always in demand for smelting Ruby 250g 🗑️ Sell No crafting use, pure money Emerald 300g 🗑️ Sell No crafting use Slime Gel 8g 🔧 Keep Used in healing potion crafting Bat Wing 5g 🗑️ Sell Only used in one late-game recipe Golem Core 120g 🔧 Keep Required for accessory upgrades Dark Stone 35g 🔧 Keep Floor 16–20 only, used for endgame gear Treasure Chest 500–2000g 🗑️ Sell Open first (may contain gear), then sell

Best money-makers by floor tier: - Floor 1–5: Mine Copper Ore but don't bother selling — save for upgrades. Money comes from gem nodes (Ruby, Emerald). - Floor 6–10: Gold Ore nodes spawn here at low rate. Sell excess Coal (over 50). - Floor 11–15: Treasure chests appear on every 3rd floor. Each averages 800g. - Floor 16–20: Mythril Ore is the jackpot — but keep every piece. Money here comes from Abyss Golem Golem Core drops (120g each, 30% drop rate).

docs.title: 🚀 Deep Mining Tips: Reaching Floor 20 Efficiently
docs.text:
1. Pre-mine prep: Bring 10 Meals (any cooked dish that restores 30+ energy) + 3 Mana Potions + Pickaxe + Best Weapon
  2. Clear path first, loot later: Each floor has one threat room. Kill the enemies, take the ladder, then backtrack for ore. Enemies don't respawn after the ladder is unlocked.
  3. Skip non-threatening fights: Cave Bats and Blue Slimes on later floors waste time. If they're not between you and the ladder, ignore them.
  4. Use pickaxe on golems: Stone Golems take 3 pickaxe hits to stun, during which you can mine freely. Don't waste weapon durability on them.
  5. Stamina management: Mining costs 4 stamina per swing, fighting costs 2. Keep a mental budget — if you're under 20 stamina on floor 14, eat a meal before the boss. Magma Warden will oneshot you if you can't dodge.
  6. Best time to mine: Rainy days. Crops don't need watering, giving you 2 extra hours in the mines.
  7. Floor reset trick: If a floor spawns too many Crystal Bats (magic resistant), exit to the mine entrance and re-enter — enemy composition reshuffles. This costs 1 in-game hour, so only do it on floors 13+.

Tip: The Mine Cart system (unlocked at floor 10) costs 20 Iron Bars to repair but is worth every ingot. It lets you warp directly to floor 10, 15, or 20 from the entrance, saving 15+ minutes of walking per run.

docs.title: 🏛️ Fields of Mistria — 博物馆捐赠与收藏完全指南
docs.text: 将你的发现捐赠给 Mistria 博物馆，不仅可以修复这座古老建筑、解锁新区域和功能，还能获得全游戏最丰厚的里程碑奖励。本指南覆盖 所有捐赠类别、稀有度分级、刷取策略和完整收藏清单。

docs.title: 🔓 博物馆解锁
docs.text:
触发条件： 游戏第 5 天左右，镇长会给你一封信告知博物馆已开放。前往城镇中心右侧的博物馆，与馆长 Katherine 对话即可开始捐赠。

💡 Tip: 从第 1 天起就保存所有你捡到的"可捐赠"物品 — 不要急着卖。很多早期看似值钱的物品（如金色齿轮、远古钱币）只有一两百金币，但捐赠后解锁的奖励价值远超这个数字。

docs.title: 📂 捐赠类别一览
docs.text: 类别 总件数 典型物品 难度 🧱 文物 (Artifacts) 35 古代工具、陶器碎片、珠宝 ⭐⭐⭐ 🦴 化石 (Fossils) 25 恐龙骨骼、远古贝壳、琥珀 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 💎 宝石 (Gems) 20 红宝石、祖母绿、紫水晶 ⭐⭐⭐ 🐟 鱼类 (Fish) 30 河鱼、海鱼、洞穴鱼 ⭐⭐ 🌿 植物标本 (Flora) 20 稀有花卉、魔法植物 ⭐⭐ 🥘 烹饪 (Cuisine) 25 各季节特色料理 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🎭 历史文物 (Relics) 15 符石、古代卷轴、神器 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 总计 170 — —

docs.title: 🎲 稀有度系统
docs.text:
每件物品有 4 个稀有度等级，直接影响捐赠分数和奖励质量：

等级 标识 基准分 常见来源 售价范围 ⚪ 普通 Common 白色 5 地面拾取、浅层挖掘 10-50g 🟢 罕见 Uncommon 绿色 15 矿洞 1-20 层、钓鱼 50-150g 🔵 稀有 Rare 蓝色 40 矿洞 20-60 层、特殊事件 150-400g 🟣 史诗 Epic 紫色 100 矿洞 60+ 层、BOSS掉落 400-1000g

稀有度权重： 同类别中，捐赠一件史诗物品 ≈ 捐赠 20 件普通物品的分数。优先刷取高稀有度物品能更快达到里程碑阈值。

docs.title: 🏆 里程碑奖励
docs.text:
捐赠分数 奖励 解锁内容 50 📜 考古学指南 解锁挖掘点标记 100 🧪 鉴定工具 可鉴定未识别物品 200 🗺️ 探宝地图 显示隐藏收藏品位置 350 🎣 稀有鱼饵配方×5 钓鱼收藏加速 500 💧 水之魔法卷轴 新魔法技能解锁 750 🪴 温室蓝图 可以建造温室 1000 🚂 火车站修复 解锁新区域 — 每天来新商品 1500 ⚡ 雷之魔法卷轴 新魔法技能 2000 🏅 博物馆大师奖杯 全收藏家成就进度

💡 Tip: 500 分解锁温室是游戏最重要的中期里程碑。建议优先刷宝石和鱼类捐赠 — 这两类物品数量多、获取稳定，能最快堆到 500 分。化石和史诗文物虽有高分但随机性太大。

docs.title: 文物类
docs.text: 物品 最佳地点 推荐工具 陶器碎片 农场南部海滩挖掘点 铲子（铜级+） 古代工具 矿洞 10-25 层 镐子 珠宝饰品 矿洞 40-50 层宝箱 钥匙 符文石碑 森林遗迹区（雨天刷新率高） 铲子

docs.title: 化石类
docs.text: 物品 最佳地点 时段 小型骨骼 矿洞 5-15 层（地面拾取） 全天 大型骨骼 矿洞 55-70 层 全天 琥珀化石 森林挖掘点（树桩旁） 雨后概率翻倍 远古贝壳 海滩区域 退潮时

docs.title: 宝石类
docs.text: 宝石 层数 开采技巧 紫水晶 10-30 留意紫色晶体群 红宝石 30-50 火把照明下反光明显 祖母绿 50-70 黑色岩石背景中找绿色 钻石 70+ 用炸弹炸大范围岩层 星之碎片 80+ 仅限特殊裂缝岩壁

docs.title: 文物（35/35）
docs.text:
• [ ] 陶器碎片 (1/6) — 普通，海滩
  • [ ] 古代钱币 (1/3) — 罕见，矿洞 5-20 层
  • [ ] 铜制工具头 (1/2) — 普通，农场挖掘
  • [ ] 铁制工具头 (1/2) — 罕见，矿洞 30-45 层
  • [ ] 古代钥匙 — 稀有，矿洞 50+ 层宝箱
  • [ ] 破碎雕像 (1/4) — 各种碎片在不同层数
  • [ ] 符文石 (1/5) — 史诗，矿洞 60+ 层
  • ...（游戏内图鉴查看完整列表）

docs.title: 鱼类（30/30）
docs.text:
• [ ] 鲈鱼 — 河流，全天
  • [ ] 鲶鱼 — 河流，雨天
  • [ ] 金鱼 — 矿洞地下湖
  • [ ] 灯笼鱼 — 矿洞 40+ 层水域
  • [ ] 海马 — 海滩，清晨
  • [ ] 小丑鱼 — 海滩，下午
  • [ ] 古代鱼 — 矿洞 70+ 层（史诗）
  • ...（详见钓鱼图鉴）

docs.title: 🔄 重复物品处理策略
docs.text:
类别 重复物品 → 建议处理 原因 普通文物 ✅ 卖掉 售价 10-50g，捐赠分已拿 罕见文物 ⚖️ 留 1-2 个备用 部分用于制作或任务 稀有文物 ❌ 保留 可能有隐藏用途或后续更新 普通鱼类 ✅ 烹饪/卖掉 钓鱼量大，不缺这一个 稀有鱼类 🐟 放鱼缸 鱼缸装饰评分高 宝石（普通） ✅ 卖掉 好卖，不值得囤积 宝石（稀有） ❌ 保留 制作高级饰品需要 化石 ✅ 卖掉 化石超过捐赠量后无其他用途

💡 Tip: 博物馆捐赠给分 ≠ 物品售价。 一件史诗文物卖商店可能值 800g，但捐给博物馆给 100 分，而 100 分可能需要 20 件普通物品（总售价约 200g 以上）。所以：先捐后卖 — 每种物品捐第一件，重复的再卖。

数据来源：Fields of Mistria Wiki 1.0, game version Early Access 0.8+

docs.title: 🌱 Fields of Mistria — Seasonal Crop Strategy Guide
docs.text: Maximizing profit in Fields of Mistria requires more than planting the most expensive seed. You must factor in growth time, regrowth cycles, energy cost, artisan multipliers, and magic enhancement bonuses. This guide breaks down every crop by true profit per day.

docs.title: 📊 Spring Crop Tier List
docs.text:
Rank Crop Seed Cost Growth Regrow Sell Price Profit/Day Energy 1 Strawberry 🥇 60 7d 4d 85 10.7 2 2 Cauliflower 🥈 50 9d No 135 9.4 3 3 Broccoli 🥉 40 7d No 100 8.6 2 4 Cabbage 30 6d No 75 7.5 2 5 Green Bean 25 5d 3d 45 6.7 1 6 Carrot 20 4d No 46 6.5 1 7 Potato 20 5d No 50 6.0 2 8 Bamboo 10 3d No 22 4.0 1

Tip: Strawberry's regrowth every 4 days makes it the spring king. With magic water enhancement, its profit/day jumps to ~14.9 — plant at least 20 on Spring 1.

docs.title: ☀️ Summer Crop Tier List
docs.text:
Rank Crop Seed Cost Growth Regrow Sell Price Profit/Day Energy 1 Watermelon 🥇 60 10d No 160 10.0 4 2 Melon 🥈 55 9d No 140 9.4 3 3 Corn 🥉 35 7d 3d 70 8.8 2 4 Blueberry 40 8d 4d 75 7.9 2 5 Tomato 30 6d 4d 60 7.5 2 6 Pepper 25 5d 3d 50 7.5 1

Strategy: Watermelon has the highest single-harvest profit but a 10-day wait. Invest in Corn (3-day regrowth) for steady mid-season income, then pivot to Watermelon for the late-season lump sum.

docs.title: 🍂 Fall Crop Tier List
docs.text:
Rank Crop Seed Cost Growth Regrow Sell Price Profit/Day Energy 1 Pumpkin 🥇 50 9d No 150 11.1 3 2 Cranberry 🥈 40 7d 5d 85 9.0 2 3 Artichoke 🥉 45 8d No 110 8.1 2 4 Sweet Potato 25 6d 4d 55 7.5 2 5 Rice 35 8d No 90 6.9 3

Fall dominates all seasons — Pumpkin at 11.1 profit/day is the game's best crop. Plant the maximum your energy budget allows.

docs.title: 🏭 Artisan Processing — Best Multipliers
docs.text:
Crop Base 🫙 Jam 🥒 Pickle 🍷 Wine Best Route Watermelon 160 340 290 420 Wine (+260) Pumpkin 150 320 280 400 Wine (+250) Cauliflower 135 290 250 350 Wine (+215) Strawberry 85 200 170 240 Wine (+155) Cranberry 85 210 175 240 Jam (+125) Corn 70 175 150 195 Wine (+125)

Build 3 Preserve Jars per 10 regrowth crops and 2 Wine Presses per 10 high-value crops. Rotate harvests to keep equipment loaded continuously.

docs.title: ✨ Magic-Enhanced Crops
docs.text:
Enhancement Element Effect Best Applied To 🌊 Water Boost Water +25% growth speed Pumpkin, Watermelon 🌍 Earth Enrich Earth +40% sell price Strawberry, Cranberry 🌪️ Air Pollinate Air +50% yield Corn, Tomato 🔥 Sun Empower Fire Double quality chance Any artisan crop

Stacking example: Earth Enrich on Strawberry (85 → 119g) + Jam processing (119g × 235% = 280g/jar) = 18.6 profit/day per tile — nearly double standard.

docs.title: ♻️ Greenhouse & Field Layout
docs.text:
Greenhouse priority: 60% Pumpkin (wine) → 25% Strawberry (jam) → 15% Cranberry (jam). Keeps artisan equipment running at full capacity year-round.

Layout Crops Daily Energy Season Profit Cheap & Fast 20 Carrot + 10 Bamboo 30 ~800g Max Profit 20 Pumpkin + 10 Cranberry 60 ~4000g Artisan Focus 12 Watermelon + 8 Corn + 10 Strawberry 55 ~5500g processed

Energy budget: Base 200 energy/day. Deduct 30 for tools. You have ~170 for watering (1 energy/tile, 2 for magic). Max manageable tiles without spells: ~85. With Rain Dance (3×3 area): ~200 tiles.

Ultimate endgame: Full greenhouse Pumpkins → Wine Press → Earth Enchantment on all tiles = ~44,000g per 28-day cycle from 80 tiles with 4 wine presses.

Data source: Fields of Mistria Wiki 1.0, game version Early Access 0.8+

docs.title: 🏞️ 星露谷物语新手攻略：开局第一天全指南
docs.text: 参考视频：王道長「纯新手向攻略（第一期）——开局第一天」 · 244万播放

docs.title: 📋 本篇涵盖
docs.text:
• 开局前准备：角色创建与农场类型选择
  • 第一天上午：起床、看电视、接任务
  • 第一天下午：探索农场、拜访鹈鹕镇
  • 第一天晚间：钓鱼、整理工具、存档策略
  • 新手避坑清单

docs.title: 🎮 1. 开局前的关键选择
docs.text: 刚打开游戏，主菜单下有三个关键选择：

docs.title: 1.1 农场类型
docs.text:
星露谷有 7种农场布局，新手推荐：

农场类型 推荐度 理由 标准农场 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 最大种植面积，最适合新手熟悉游戏机制 河边农场 ⭐⭐⭐ 钓鱼方便但种地空间少 森林农场 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 前期物资丰富（硬木/野草），喜欢采集可选 山顶农场 ⭐⭐ 地形崎岖，新手容易迷路 荒野农场 ⭐⭐ 晚上刷怪，新手压力大 四角农场 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 联机或喜欢规整布局可选 海滩农场 ⭐ 不能放洒水器，极度不适合新手

💡 推荐：第一档玩 标准农场，熟悉后再换其他类型。

docs.title: 1.2 角色自定义
docs.text:
• 名字：随意，但建议用自己能记住的英文名（联机时方便）
  • 宠物偏好：猫🐱 和狗🐶 只是外观区别，不影响游戏性
  • 喜欢的事物：不影响游戏机制，只是NPC对话彩蛋

docs.title: 🏠 2. 第一天早上（6:00–8:00）
docs.text: 游戏从 春1日 早上6:00 开始。你站在爷爷留下的荒废农场上。

docs.title: 2.1 第一步：进屋看电视
docs.text:
进门前先按 E 打开工具栏，右键电视 可以收看：

频道 作用 建议 🌤️ 天气预报 查看明天的天气 ✅ 每天必看 — 下雨天不用浇水，适合下矿 🔮 算命占卜 查看今日运气 ✅ 每天必看 — 好运日适合下矿/钓鱼/开晶球 🍳 酱料女皇 学新菜谱（周日/周三重播） 前期不太重要 🌙 离地而居 游戏小贴士 新手建议看几期

⚡ 第一天：春1日通常是晴天，运气中等偏上。看完电视后，时间才到6:10左右，有大把时间。

docs.title: 2.2 检查信箱 📬
docs.text: 出门后在房屋右侧的邮箱处拿到第一封信——市长刘易斯 欢迎你来到星露谷，并给了你 15个防风草种子 作为见面礼。

docs.title: 3.1 开垦农田
docs.text:
先别急着去镇上！第一天最重要的任务是 开垦土地并种下防风草：

  1. 清出空地：用斧头砍几棵树（获得木材），用镰刀割杂草
  2. 耕地：用锄头右键点击土地，开垦约 15格 即可（刚好种完送的种子）
  3. 播种：打开背包（E键），选中防风草种子，在耕好的地上右键
  4. 浇水：用水壶右键浇满每一格（水壶在池塘边右键可以灌水）

📝 第一天的体力管理：你有 270体力（绿色能量条）。砍树和锄地都会消耗体力。建议保留至少一半体力去钓鱼。

docs.title: 3.2 必做：拜访罗宾（木匠）
docs.text:
往地图右侧走 → 进入深山区域 → 找到 罗宾的木匠店（营业到下午5点）。

跟她说话可以获得重要信息，同时解锁 接取任务 功能。

docs.title: 🗺️ 4. 探索鹈鹕镇
docs.text:
沿农场的路一直往下走，你会进入鹈鹕镇。第一天建议至少认识这几个关键NPC：

NPC 位置 为何重要 皮埃尔 🏪 杂货店（镇上中央） 买种子、卖作物的地方（营业到下午5点） 罗宾 🪚 木匠店（山上） 建建筑、升级工具、买家具 克林特 ⛏️ 铁匠铺（镇东南） 升级工具、开晶球 威利 🎣 鱼店（海滩） 买鱼竿、鱼饵 乔迪 / 玛妮 各自家中 前期任务会用到

⚠️ 注意：大部分商店 下午5点关门！第一天主要是认路，不用急着买东西。

docs.title: 第一天路线推荐
docs.text:
农场 → 罗宾木匠店（看路） → 皮埃尔杂货店（卖作物换钱）
→ 海滩见威利（买训练鱼竿） → 回家种地 → 傍晚钓鱼

docs.title: 🎣 5. 傍晚：钓鱼开局
docs.text: 钓鱼是 星露谷前期最赚钱的活动。

docs.title: 5.1 怎么获得鱼竿
docs.text:
如果第一天不钓鱼，可以在春3日 威利给你邮寄 一根竹鱼竿。

要提前钓鱼： - 去海滩找威利花 50g 买竹鱼竿（或 25g 训练鱼竿——鱼更难跑） - 想钓鱼需要先挖一些 虫子（用锄头挖地里的蠕虫洞），合成鱼饵

docs.title: 5.2 第一天钓鱼收益
docs.text:
时间 地点 常见鱼 售价 6:00–19:00 山区湖 虹鳟鱼/鲈鱼 75g~100g 全天 海滩 沙丁鱼 50g 全天 镇旁河 鲈鱼 50g

💡 新手钓鱼技巧：轻点鼠标控制进度条，不要一直按着。鱼动你才动，鱼停就松开让进度条回到中间。

docs.title: ⚔️ 6. 避坑清单（新手必看）
docs.text: ❌ 不要做的事 ✅ 应该做的事 ❌ 卖掉所有木材和石头 ✅ 留下至少 50个木材 修桥（春3日任务） ❌ 第一天就买很多种子 ✅ 先防风草15个，赚钱后春2日补种 ❌ 挥霍体力砍树 ✅ 保留 100+体力 钓鱼/下矿 ❌ 晚上12点后还在外面 ✅ 凌晨2点前必须上床睡觉！ ❌ 开垦超出播种能力的土地 ✅ 第一天15格就够 ❌ 把所有金币花光 ✅ 至少要留 100g 以备不时之需

docs.title: 📊 第一天目标清单
docs.text:
• [x] 起床看电视（天气预报 + 算命）
  • [x] 查看邮箱，拿到防风草种子
  • [x] 开垦15格土地，种下防风草
  • [x] 认识罗宾、皮埃尔等关键NPC
  • [x] 保留足够体力钓鱼赚钱
  • [x] 凌晨2点前回家睡觉
  • [x] 保存游戏（睡觉自动存）

docs.title: 🎯 第一天小目标总结
docs.text:
目标：把15个防风草种下去 → 认识镇上几个关键NPC → 傍晚钓鱼攒第一桶金。

春2日预告： - 皮埃尔杂货店开门（买更多防风草种子） - 如果下雨 → 不用浇水 → 适合去矿洞 - 继续钓鱼攒钱 → 春5日之前目标是 攒够2000g买草莓种子

视频来源：B站 · 王道長 — 纯新手向攻略（第一期）——开局第一天 发布于 FarmingGames.Help — 种田游戏攻略一站式数据库

docs.title: Game Overview
docs.text:
• Developer: Singularity 6
  • Platform: PC / NS
  • Genre: Farming MMO (Free-to-Play)
  • Features: Multiplayer online farming + adventure

docs.title: Fast Leveling 1-10
docs.text:
1. Complete the tutorial → Unlock basic tools
  2. Plant wheat (3-day maturity, cooking staple)
  3. Fish → Fastest early-game money maker
  4. Mine → Important materials for tool upgrades

docs.title: Fastest Money-Making Methods
docs.text: Method Hourly Rate Requirements Fishing (hotspots) 3K-5K Fishing skill 4+ Rare bug catching 2K-4K Advanced bug net Cooking quests 1K-2K Kitchen upgrade Growing cotton 1K-3K Seeds unlocked

docs.title: Best Leveling Path
docs.text: Skill Priority Recommended Method Fishing ⭐⭐⭐ Daily hotspots Foraging ⭐⭐⭐ Pick as you go Cooking ⭐⭐ Fulfill orders for money Gardening ⭐⭐⭐ Plant every day Bug Catching ⭐ Level up when you have time Mining ⭐⭐ Go when ore respawns

docs.title: Social Features
docs.text:
• Friend System — Farm and fish together
  • Housing System — Customizable decoration
  • Festival Events — Limited-time quests
  • NPC Affinity — Give gifts to unlock story

docs.title: Beginner Pitfalls
docs.text:
1. ❌ Don't rush to expand your house — Upgrade tools first
  2. ✅ Complete NPC quests daily — Source of XP
  3. ✅ Pick up all materials on the ground — They're all useful
  4. ❌ Don't sell rare materials — You'll need them for later upgrades

docs.title: 🍳 Palia Cooking & Recipes Complete Guide
docs.text: Cooking 是 Palia 中最具战略深度的技能。食物提供 Focus（专注值），直接决定你的经验获取倍率。本文详解从解锁到高阶盈利的全流程。

docs.title: 🔧 烹饪台解锁
docs.text:
设备 解锁方式 用途 Campfire（篝火） Learning the Ropes 任务赠送 基础烹饪（烤肉、烤鱼、茶） Prep Station（备料台） Reth 公会商店 1,500金 切菜、和面、制作半成品 Standard Stove（炉灶） Reth 公会商店 2,500金 炖菜、炒菜、汤类 Standard Oven（烤箱） Reth 公会商店 2,000金 烘烤类（派、面包、千层） Mixing Station（搅拌台） Reth 公会商店 1,800金 果汁、冰沙、甜品

Tip: 优先购买 Prep Station + Standard Stove，这两个覆盖了最多的高收益食谱。Campfire 做基础升 Lv 5 即可。

docs.title: 📊 最佳食谱大全
docs.text: 食谱 稀有度 主要材料 专注值 售价 关键效果 Grilled Meat (烤肉) 普通 生肉×2 25 24 基础饱腹 Fish Stew (鱼汤) 普通 任意鱼+香料+大蒜 50 55 🎣 +钓鱼瞄准速度 Meaty Stir Fry (炒肉) 稀有 肉+蔬菜+米饭+油 150 180 ⛏️ +采掘效率 Celebration Cake (庆典蛋糕) 史诗 蓝莓+黄油+蛋+面粉+水果 375 420 ❤️ 最佳送礼 Muujin Bahari 史诗 肉+香料+蔬菜+油+蛋 500 650 💪 全属性加成 Chapaa Masala (咖喱) 史诗 肉+奶+香料+番茄 350 410 🌿 +采集范围 Bouillabaisse (海鲜汤) 稀有 鲈鱼+牡蛎+土豆+洋葱 200 240 🎣 +钓鱼极品 Blueberry Pie (蓝莓派) 稀有 黄油+面粉+蓝莓×2 220 260 🎁 NPC好感度 Sushi (寿司) 多变 任意鱼+米+海苔 100 135 ❤️ 多个NPC最爱

docs.title: 🔵 Focus 系统详解
docs.text:
Focus 是 Palia 独有的经验倍率系统：

Focus 状态 经验倍率 说明 无 Focus 1× 无额外经验 低 Focus (<50%) 1.25× 少量加成 中 Focus (50-80%) 1.5× 不错加成 高 Focus (>80%) 2× 最大加成 Focus 上限 — 随技能等级提升

核心机制: - 吃煮熟的食物获得 Focus 值 - Focus 值越高，所有技能获得的经验倍率越高 - Focus 会随着时间自然消耗（做任何技能操作都会消耗） - 保持 Focus >80% = 升级速度翻倍

Tip: 练级前先吃一个高 Focus 食物（如 Celebration Cake +375 Focus），然后集中做技能操作，最大化每单位时间的经验收益。

docs.title: 🎯 不同活动的最佳食物
docs.text: 活动 推荐食物 理由 ⛏️ Mining Meaty Stir Fry（+采掘效率） 提高挖矿速度 🌿 Foraging Chapaa Masala（+采集范围） 一次采更多 🎣 Fishing Fisherman's Brew / Fish Stew 提升瞄准速度和判定范围 🏹 Hunting Grilled Meat（低成本高Focus） 批量制作，维持Focus 🌱 Gardening 任何水果派 兼顾Focus和好感度礼物 ❤️ 送礼 Celebration Cake / 蓝莓派 几乎所有人喜爱

docs.title: ⭐ 品质系统（Ingredient Quality）
docs.text:
配料品质 对菜品影响 获得方式 普通原料 基础菜品品质 标准采摘/钓鱼/狩猎 ⭐ Starred 原料 提升成品星级概率 高技能、完美操作、Honey Lure 混合品质 取决于平均品质 一个星标+三个普通=中等概率出星

关键规则: - 使用星标原料烹饪，成品有更高概率也是星标 - 星标菜品售价 1.5×，NPC 好感度加成更高 - 想稳定出星标菜，最好所有原料都是星标

Tip: 批量烹饪时先统计星标原料数量。如果星标原料不够做一整套，考虑先把星标原料单独出售（1.5×）比混入普通菜更划算。

docs.title: 🎭 剧情烹饪任务
docs.text: 任务名称 需求菜品 奖励 Cooking 101 Grilled Fish / Grilled Meat 烹饪经验，基础食谱 Half Boiled 特定熟食 稀有食材 The Great Human Bake-Off Macaron 系列任务+装饰品 Lost in the Wind Akwinduu Chapaa 稀有食谱+经验 各NPC烹饪请求 多种菜品 好感度+金币+独家食谱

docs.title: 💰 盈利分析
docs.text:
菜品 原料成本 售价 净利润 利润率 Grilled Meat 肉×2 (≈30) 24 -6 ❌ 亏本 Sushi 鱼+米 (≈50) 135 85 170% ✅ Blueberry Pie 蓝莓×2+面粉+黄油 (≈160) 260 100 62% ✅ Celebration Cake 大量原料 (≈200-250) 420 170-220 68-85% ✅ Muujin Bahari 肉+蔬菜+香料 (≈300) 650 350 116% ✅ Fish Stew 鱼+香料+蒜 (≈80) 55 -25 ❌ 亏本

Tip: Celebration Cake 是性价比之王——制作门槛不高，售价可观，且是所有NPC的通用最爱礼物。Muujin Bahari 是后期最佳刷金菜品。注意 Fish Stew 和 Grilled Meat 原料成本高于售价，只为练级和Focus，不要为了赚钱做。

docs.title: 刷金烹饪流程
docs.text:
1. Lv 1-5: 批量做 Grilled Meat / Grilled Fish → 快速升级，不走盈利路线
  2. Lv 5-8: 做 Sushi / Blueberry Pie → 开始盈利
  3. Lv 8-10+: 批量做 Celebration Cake → 自用送礼 + 出售两相宜
  4. Lv 10+ 多人烹饪: 组织 Cake Party，分工协作一次产出 50-100 个蛋糕

docs.title: Palia — Crop Profit Guide
docs.text:
Optimize your garden layout and crop selection in Palia with this complete profit guide. Unlike most farming games, Palia uses a garden-plot grid system where crops can be planted individually or in rows, and quality (star value) affects sell prices.

Note: All prices shown are base (non-star) quality. Star-quality crops sell for roughly 1.5× base price. Gardening skill level and fertilizer can also boost yield and quality.

docs.title: Crop Profit Table
docs.text: Crop Seed Price (Gold) Growth (Hours) Harvest Yield Sell Price Profit/Plot Carrot 10 24h 1 18 8 Potato 15 48h 1 33 18 Tomato 20 48h 2 16 each 12 Onion 12 36h 1 25 13 Corn 25 60h 2 20 each 15 Rice 15 36h 1 28 13 Wheat 10 24h 1 20 10 Blueberry 30 72h 3 15 each 15 Cotton 20 48h 2 18 each 16 Pepper 18 48h 2 15 each 12 Lettuce 8 18h 1 14 6 Cabbage 22 48h 1 45 23 Bok Choy 14 30h 1 28 14 Spinach 12 24h 1 24 12 Ginger 35 72h 1 65 30 Mushroom 30 72h 2 28 each 26

docs.text: Crop Growth Profit/Plot Profit/Hour Lettuce 18h 6 0.33 Carrot 24h 8 0.33 Wheat 24h 10 0.42 Spinach 24h 12 0.50

docs.title: Medium Crops (36–48 hours)
docs.text: Crop Growth Profit/Plot Profit/Hour Onion 36h 13 0.36 Bok Choy 30h 14 0.47 Rice 36h 13 0.36 Potato 48h 18 0.38 Tomato 48h 12 0.25 Cabbage 48h 23 0.48 Cotton 48h 16 0.33 Pepper 48h 12 0.25 Corn 60h 15 0.25

docs.text: Crop Growth Profit/Plot Profit/Hour Blueberry 72h 15 0.21 Ginger 72h 30 0.42 Mushroom 72h 26 0.36

docs.title: Star Quality Value Multiplier
docs.text:
Quality Price Multiplier Example: Carrot ⭐ Base (No Star) 1.0× 18 Gold ⭐⭐ Star Quality ~1.5× 27 Gold ⭐⭐⭐ Rare Star ~2.0× 36 Gold

Star quality is random but can be increased with: - Quality Up Fertilizer — Boosts star quality chance by 25% - Gardening Skill Level — Each level slightly increases base quality chance - Special Soil Plots — Some home plot layouts have natural quality bonuses

docs.title: Gardening Level Rewards
docs.text: Level Unlock 1 Basic Soil Plots (3×3), Carrot Seeds 2 Potato Seeds, Watering Can Upgrade 3 Onion Seeds, Cotton Seeds 4 Extra Soil Plot (unlock 4th row) 5 Tomato Seeds, Quality Up Fertilizer 6 Rice Seeds, Bok Choy Seeds 7 Extra Soil Plot (unlock 5th row) 8 Corn Seeds, Pepper Seeds 9 Blueberry Seeds, Mushroom Seeds 10 Ginger Seeds, Deluxe Fertilizer

docs.title: Best Crops for Each Play Style
Early Game (Levels 1–4)
docs.text: Priority Crop Why 1st Carrot Fastest turnaround, cheap seeds 2nd Wheat Quick cash + cooking ingredient 3rd Onion Decent profit, 36h growth 4th Potato Best early profit-per-plot

docs.title: Mid Game (Levels 5–8)
docs.text: Priority Crop Why 1st Cabbage Best profit-per-plot at 48h 2nd Bok Choy Fast medium profit 3rd Cotton High yield (2 per harvest) 4th Corn Good multi-harvest crop

docs.title: Late Game (Levels 9–10)
docs.text: Priority Crop Why 1st Ginger Highest profit-per-plot (30 Gold) 2nd Mushroom Second best at 26 Gold/plot 3rd Blueberry Multi-harvest, good for gifts 4th Cabbage Still top-tier for 48h cycle

docs.title: Gardening Tips
docs.text:
• Watering: Crops only grow when watered. Unwatered crops pause growth but don't die.
  • Weeds: Weeds spawn randomly on unplanted soil plots. Remove them before they spread.
  • Fertilizer: Quality Up Fertilizer is best for high-base-price crops (Ginger, Cabbage, Mushroom).
  • Multi-harvest: Tomato, Corn, Cotton, Pepper, and Blueberry produce multiple items per harvest — great for cooking ingredients.
  • Gifting: Star-quality Blueberries are a liked gift for many NPCs; Star-quality Sweet Leaf is a weekly want for some.
  • Plot expansion: Invest in extra soil plots as soon as you level up — more plots = more gold.

docs.title: Weekly Profit Estimate (20 Plots)
docs.text:
Strategy Crops Est. Gold/Week Fast Cycle Lettuce, Carrot, Spinach ~900 Balanced Cabbage, Potato, Onion, Bok Choy ~1,600 High Value Ginger, Mushroom, Blueberry ~2,200 Star Focus Ginger (Quality Fertilizer) ~3,000+

Data source: Palia Wiki 1.0

docs.title: Palia Crops Database
docs.text: Gardening is one of the most rewarding and profitable skills in Palia. Whether you are a new player looking to make your first gold or a seasoned farmer optimizing your plot for maximum efficiency, understanding each crop’s grow time, seed cost, and profit per harvest is essential. This database covers every crop currently available in Palia, organized by category, with detailed tables and practical tips to help you plan your farm.

docs.title: Crop Categories Overview
docs.text: Palia crops are divided into three main categories: Vegetables, Fruits, and Special Crops. Each category has unique growth mechanics, seed costs, and harvest yields. Vegetables are the most common and form the backbone of any farm. Fruits require more time but often yield higher profits per harvest. Special crops include rare or event-specific plants that can be used for cooking, gifting, or selling.

docs.title: Vegetable Crops
docs.text:
Vegetables are the foundation of Palia gardening. They grow quickly, have lower seed costs, and are excellent for generating consistent income. Below is the complete list of vegetable crops with their key stats.

Crop Name Seed Cost (Gold) Grow Time (Hours) Harvest Yield Sell Price per Unit Profit per Harvest Carrot 10 6 2 15 20 Potato 15 8 2 25 35 Onion 20 10 2 35 50 Tomato 25 12 3 30 65 Corn 30 14 2 50 70 Pepper 35 16 2 60 85 Rice 40 18 2 75 110 Wheat 20 8 3 20 40

Notes on Vegetables: - Carrots and Potatoes are ideal for early-game gold due to their short grow times. - Tomatoes and Corn offer the best profit per hour when planted in bulk. - Wheat is unique because it yields 3 units per harvest, making it excellent for cooking recipes.

docs.title: Fruit Crops
docs.text:
Fruits take longer to grow but produce higher-value items. Many fruits are also used in advanced cooking recipes or as gifts for villagers. Fruit crops often require trellises or specific garden layouts.

Crop Name Seed Cost (Gold) Grow Time (Hours) Harvest Yield Sell Price per Unit Profit per Harvest Blueberry 50 24 2 100 150 Apple 60 30 2 120 180 Peach 70 36 2 150 230 Cherry 80 40 2 180 280 Grape 90 48 3 130 300

Notes on Fruits: - Grapes are the most profitable fruit per harvest, but they require the longest grow time. - Blueberries are a great mid-game crop with a reasonable 24-hour grow time. - Fruits are often used in juice-making or jam recipes, which can double their value.

docs.title: Special Crops
docs.text:
Special crops include rare seeds obtained from events, quests, or high-level gardening. These crops often have unique properties, such as being used for special recipes or having a chance to produce multiple harvests.

Crop Name Seed Cost (Gold) Grow Time (Hours) Harvest Yield Sell Price per Unit Profit per Harvest Starfruit 150 72 1 500 350 Mushroom 100 48 2 200 300 Spice Sprout 80 36 2 160 240 Cotton 40 20 3 50 110

Notes on Special Crops: - Starfruit is the highest-value single crop but has a long grow time and high seed cost. It is best used for gifting or cooking. - Mushrooms are a reliable source of income for mid-to-late game players. - Cotton is essential for crafting fabric and furniture, making it valuable beyond just selling.

docs.title: Profit Analysis and Best Crops by Strategy
Best Crops for Early Game (First 20 Hours)
docs.text:
If you are just starting out, focus on crops with low seed costs and fast grow times. Carrots and Potatoes are your best friends. Plant as many as your energy allows, and reinvest your profits into more seeds.

  • Carrot: 6-hour grow time, 20 gold profit per harvest. You can plant and harvest 4 times in a single day.
  • Potato: 8-hour grow time, 35 gold profit per harvest. Slightly better profit per hour than carrots.

docs.title: Best Crops for Mid Game (20-50 Hours)
docs.text:
Once you have a steady gold flow, switch to higher-profit crops like Tomatoes, Corn, and Blueberries. These crops offer better returns per garden plot.

  • Tomato: 12-hour grow time, 65 gold profit per harvest. Great for cooking and selling.
  • Blueberry: 24-hour grow time, 150 gold profit per harvest. Perfect for daily harvest cycles.

docs.title: Best Crops for Late Game (50+ Hours)
docs.text:
Late-game players should focus on Grapes, Starfruit, and Mushrooms. These crops require patience but yield the highest profits and are essential for end-game recipes.

  • Grape: 48-hour grow time, 300 gold profit per harvest. Best profit per plot.
  • Starfruit: 72-hour grow time, 350 gold profit per harvest. Ideal for special dishes.

docs.title: Watering and Fertilizer
docs.text: All crops require regular watering. You can use a watering can or build sprinklers to automate the process. Fertilizer can be applied to reduce grow time or increase yield. Quality fertilizer reduces grow time by 20%, while Rich Fertilizer increases harvest yield by 1 unit.

docs.title: Crop Rotation and Soil Quality
docs.text: Soil quality degrades over time. Planting the same crop repeatedly reduces yield. Rotate your crops to maintain soil health. Using fertilizer also helps replenish soil nutrients.

docs.title: Multi-Harvest Crops
docs.text: Some crops, like Tomatoes and Grapes, can be harvested multiple times. After the initial harvest, the plant will regrow in half the original grow time. This makes them extremely efficient for long-term farming.

docs.title: Quick Tips
docs.text:
• Start small: Focus on Carrots and Potatoes until you have at least 500 gold.
  • Automate early: Build sprinklers as soon as possible to save time and energy.
  • Use fertilizer: Quality Fertilizer on high-value crops like Grapes can significantly boost your daily profit.
  • Sell raw or cook: Cooking ingredients into meals often doubles or triples their value. Check recipes before selling. | - Gift wisely: Some villagers love specific crops. Gifting a Starfruit to a villager can increase friendship faster than any other gift. | - Plan your layout: Leave space for trellises if you plan to grow fruits like Grapes. A well-organized garden saves time and maximizes space. | - Check the market: Crop prices fluctuate daily. Sell when prices are high for maximum profit.

docs.title: Additional Crops (Cross-Reference)
docs.text:
The following crops are available in Palia but may not appear in every seed vendor's inventory. They are unlocked through Gardening level progression or special sources.

Crop Name Seed Cost (Gold) Grow Time (Hours) Harvest Yield Sell Price per Unit Profit per Harvest Lettuce 8 18 1 14 6 Cabbage 22 48 1 45 23 Bok Choy 14 30 1 28 14 Spinach 12 24 1 24 12 Ginger 35 72 1 65 30

Notes on Additional Crops: - Lettuce is the fastest-growing crop at just 18 hours — ideal for quick turnaround plots. - Cabbage offers the best profit-per-hour among 48-hour crops. - Ginger ties with Starfruit as the highest profit-per-plot crop at 30 Gold. - Bok Choy and Spinach are solid mid-game options with moderate grow times and decent margins.

Data note: There are minor differences between community sources for some crop stats. The tables above represent the most commonly accepted values. Star-quality crops sell for ~1.5x base price.

docs.title: Early Game Combo (Gardening Lv 1-4)
docs.text:
Plot Slots Crop Mix Total Cost Est. Daily Profit Why 9 (3×3) 5 Carrot + 4 Wheat 130 ~180 Fast turnaround, cooking staples 12 (3×4) 6 Carrot + 3 Wheat + 3 Potato 165 ~260 Balanced profit and cooking use

Strategy: Plant in the evening before logging off. Carrots (6h) are ready by morning, Wheat (8h) by midday. Harvest, sell, reinvest.

docs.title: Mid Game Combo (Gardening Lv 5-8)
docs.text:
Plot Slots Crop Mix Total Cost Est. Daily Profit Why 20 (4×5) 8 Tomato + 6 Corn + 6 Cabbage 582 ~500 Multi-harvest + high profit 20 (4×5) 10 Cotton + 5 Bok Choy + 5 Rice 660 ~550 Cotton for crafting + food

Strategy: Tomatoes and Corn give you multi-harvest — plant once, harvest repeatedly. Cabbage gives the best single-harvest profit. Cotton is essential for furniture crafting.

docs.title: Late Game Combo (Gardening Lv 9-10)
docs.text:
Plot Slots Crop Mix Total Cost Est. Daily Profit Why 20 (4×5) 6 Ginger + 6 Mushroom + 8 Blueberry 810 ~1,100 Highest profit per plot 20 (4×5) 8 Grape + 6 Starfruit + 6 Spice Sprout 1,720 ~1,600 End-game max efficiency

Strategy: Ginger + Mushroom + Blueberry is your daily gold machine. Grape + Starfruit is for long-term investors (72h cycles). Use Quality Fertilizer on Ginger for star-quality bonuses.

docs.title: The "Set It and Forget It" Combo
docs.text:
For players who can only log in once per day:

Crop Why Blueberry (24h) Harvest once daily, multi-harvest Cabbage (48h) Harvest every other day, best profit/plot Tomato (12h) Can stretch to 24h without losing crop Rice (18h) Flexible timing, decent profit

Plant a 50/50 mix of Blueberries and Cabbages for ~800 Gold/day with minimal effort.

docs.title: Star Quality Optimization
docs.text:
Maximizing star-quality crops significantly boosts income:

  1. Quality Up Fertilizer on high-base-price crops (Ginger, Cabbage, Mushroom)
  2. Gardening skill levels passively increase star quality chance
  3. Special soil plots — home plot layouts with natural bonuses
  4. Sell star-quality crops individually — don't cook them unless a recipe specifically needs star ingredients

Estimated income uplift: A full plot of Ginger with Quality Fertilizer yields ~3,000+ Gold/week vs. ~1,500 without.

docs.title: Palia Fish Database — Complete Fish Catalog
docs.text: Welcome to the most comprehensive Palia fish database. Whether you’re a seasoned angler looking to complete your collection or a new player trying to finish a bundle, this guide covers every fish in the game. We’ve organized everything by location, bait type, and bundle relevance so you can spend less time guessing and more time reeling in the big ones.

docs.title: How Fishing Works in Palia
docs.text:
Fishing in Palia is a core skill that rewards you with food ingredients, quest items, and valuable resources. Each body of water has its own unique fish pool. Your success depends on three main factors:

  • Location: Rivers, lakes, ponds, and coastal waters each host different species.
  • Bait: Standard worms work for most fish, but glow worms and special bait are required for rare and epic catches.
  • Time of Day: Some fish only appear during the day (6:00–18:00), others at night (18:00–6:00), and a few are active 24/7.

You can also use fishing hooks and buffs from food to increase your catch rate, but the tables below assume no modifiers.

docs.title: Complete Fish Table by Location
docs.text: Below is the master table of every fish in Palia, sorted by the region where you can catch them. Rarity is indicated as Common (C), Uncommon (U), Rare (R), or Epic (E).

docs.title: Bundle Information
docs.text: Bundles are a major endgame goal in Palia. Completing them rewards you with unique furniture, recipes, and progression items. Here’s exactly which fish you need for each bundle.

docs.title: Fisherman’s Bundle
docs.text:
• Catfish (Kilima River, Night, Worm)
  • Longnose Gar (Bahari River, Night, Glow Worm)
  • 1 additional uncommon fish of your choice

Reward: Fishing Rod Stand (decorative item)

docs.title: Oceanic Bundle
docs.text:
• Giant Stingray (Kilima Coast, Any, Glow Worm)
  • Coral Trout (Bahari Coast, Day, Glow Worm)
  • 1 additional ocean fish of uncommon or higher rarity

Reward: Seashell Chime (wall decoration)

docs.title: Night Sky Bundle
docs.text:
• Void Ray (Kilima River, Night, Glow Worm)
  • Midnight Pike (Bahari River, Night, Glow Worm)
  • Glowing Koi (Underground Lake, Night, Glow Worm)

Reward: Starry Night Lantern (light source)

docs.title: Master Angler Bundle
docs.text:
• Kilima Sturgeon (Kilima River, Any, Glow Worm)
  • Ancient Fish (Kilima Coast, Night, Glow Worm)
  • Mythic Fish (Bahari Coast, Night, Glow Worm)
  • Crystal Carp (Underground Lake, Any, Glow Worm)

Reward: Master Angler Trophy (display item) + 5,000 Gold

docs.title: Bait Guide
docs.text:
Knowing which bait to use saves you time and resources.

  • Worm Bait: Standard bait. Catches all common and uncommon fish. Can be dug from the ground or purchased from the General Store for 10 Gold each.
  • Glow Worm Bait: Required for all rare and epic fish. Crafted using 1 Worm Bait + 1 Brightshroom. Brightshrooms are found in caves and near water at night.
  • Special Bait: Some limited-time events introduce unique bait, but glow worms are your primary tool for high-tier fishing.

Pro Tip: Always carry at least 50 glow worms when heading to Bahari Bay or the Underground. Rare fish appear more frequently in these zones, and you don’t want to waste a trip.

docs.title: Fishing Skill Progression
docs.text:
Your fishing level increases as you catch fish. Higher levels unlock new recipes, better rods, and the ability to catch rarer fish without as much struggle.

Level Unlock 1 Basic Rod, Worm Bait 3 Standard Rod (longer cast) 5 Glow Worm Bait recipe 7 Fine Rod (better reel speed) 10 Exquisite Rod (best stats) 15 Fishing Hook upgrades available

docs.title: Quick Tips
docs.text:
1. Always fish at night for epics. Every epic fish in Palia (except Crystal Carp) is only available between 18:00 and 6:00. Plan your fishing trips accordingly.
  2. Use glow worms for bundles. If you’re working on bundles, skip worm bait entirely. Glow worms are the only way to catch the rare and epic fish required.
  3. Fish in the Underground for variety. The Underground Lake is the only place to catch Glowing Koi and Crystal Carp, both needed for bundles. It’s also a great spot for leveling up.
  4. Don’t sell rare fish. Before selling any fish, check if it’s needed for a bundle. You’ll save yourself hours of frustration later.
  5. Eat fishing buff food. Dishes like Fisherman’s Brew (+2 Fishing) and Spicy Fish Stew (+3 Fishing) increase your catch rate and reduce the time fish take to bite. Always cook these before a serious fishing session.
  6. Upgrade your rod first. Spend your early gold on the Standard Rod, then the Fine Rod. The longer cast and faster reel speed make a huge difference when chasing rare fish.

Happy fishing, and may your line always be tight! For more Palia guides, check out our crop database and crafting recipes.

docs.title: Complete Friendship & Romance Guide for Palia
docs.text: Building relationships with the villagers of Palia is a core part of the game. Not only does it unlock heartwarming cutscenes and lore, but it also grants you essential recipes, furniture, and even the ability to romance multiple characters. This guide covers everything you need to know: from NPC gift preferences and weekly wants to romance levels and the fastest path to maxing out every relationship. For other Palia resources, check our Crops Guide, Fish Database, or Crop Profit Calculator.

docs.title: Beginner Tips for Friendship & Romance
docs.text:
Before diving into the specifics, here are the golden rules for efficient relationship building in Palia:

  1. Talk to Everyone Daily: Speaking to an NPC once per day gives a small friendship boost. It’s free and adds up over time.
  2. Gift Weekly Wants First: Every NPC has a "Weekly Want" that changes every Monday. Gifting this item gives a massive friendship bonus (usually 3x a normal liked gift). Prioritize these.
  3. Know Their Loves vs. Likes: "Love" gifts give the most points, "Like" gifts give moderate points, and "Dislike" gifts give nothing or negative points. Never give a disliked item.
  4. Use Cake Parties for High-Value Gifts: The best universal "Love" gifts are often high-tier cooked meals. Join a "Cake Party" (a player-organized event on the Palia Discord or in-game chat) to mass-produce cakes like Celebration Cake or Bundled Blueberry Pie with other players sharing ingredients and labor.
  5. Romance is Separate from Friendship: You can max friendship (Level 4) with everyone. Romance (Level 1-4) is an additional track that requires you to first reach friendship level 3 and then give a "Heartdrop Lily" to initiate.
  6. You Can Romance Everyone: Palia allows polyamory. You can romance every eligible NPC simultaneously without jealousy penalties.
  7. Focus on One NPC at a Time: For fastest results, focus your high-value gifts on one NPC per day until they are maxed, then move to the next.

docs.title: Friendship Levels (1-4)
docs.text:
• Level 1: Unlock basic dialogue and the ability to give gifts.
  • Level 2: Unlock the NPC's first friendship quest and a small reward (e.g., recipe, furniture).
  • Level 3: Unlock the ability to initiate romance (requires a Heartdrop Lily). Also unlocks a second friendship quest.
  • Level 4: Max friendship. Unlocks the final friendship quest and a significant reward (e.g., a rare recipe, a plushie, or a writ).

docs.title: Romance Levels (1-4)
docs.text:
• Level 1: Unlock the "Flirt" dialogue option and a pin.
  • Level 2: Unlock a romance-specific quest and a unique reward (e.g., a wall decoration).
  • Level 3: Unlock a second romance quest and a more personal reward (e.g., a portrait).
  • Level 4: Max romance. Unlocks the final romance quest and the ultimate reward (e.g., a unique outfit, a special emote, or a furniture set).

docs.title: All NPC Gift Preferences & Weekly Wants
docs.text:
Below is the master table of every NPC, their universally loved gifts, and their typical weekly want categories. Note: Weekly wants are randomized each week, but they always fall into one of the categories listed below.

NPC Universal Love (Best Gift) Universal Like (Good Gift) Weekly Want Category Auni Glow Worm, Any Fish Bugs, Foraged Items Bugs, Fish Ashura Grilled Meat, Any Sushi Meat Dishes, Mushrooms Cooked Meat Dishes Badruu Pickled Potatoes, Any Cake Vegetables, Seeds Cooked Vegetable Dishes Caleri Any Book (e.g., The Lost Chapter), Starstone Gatherables, Gems Gatherables, Books Chayne Heartdrop Lily, Any Tea Foraged Herbs, Mushrooms Foraged Items, Tea Delaila Celebration Cake, Any Pie Eggs, Milk, Butter Cooked Desserts Einar Any Fish (especially rare ones), Glow Worm Fishing Lures, Shells Fish, Fishing Supplies Elouisa Any Mushroom, Any Rare Bug Bugs, Gatherables Bugs, Mushrooms Eshe Any Gem (e.g., Emerald, Garnet), Starstone High-value Gatherables Gems, Starstones Hassian Any Meat Dish (e.g., Spicy Rice), Any Sushi Meat, Hunting Lures Cooked Meat Dishes Hekla Any Fish Dish (e.g., Fish Stew), Any Gem Fish, Gems Cooked Fish Dishes Hodari Any Sushi, Any Fish Dish Fish, Mining Resources Cooked Fish Dishes Jel Any Fabric (e.g., Silk, Cotton), Any Rare Gem Gatherables, Thread Fabric, Gems Jina Any Book, Any Gem Gatherables, Fossils Books, Gems Kenyatta Any Cake, Any Sweet (e.g., Candy) Cooked Desserts, Flowers Cooked Desserts Nai'o Any Meat Dish, Any Sushi Meat, Vegetables Cooked Meat Dishes Najuma Any Gem, Any Rare Ore (e.g., Palium) Mining Resources, Gems Gems, Ores Reth Any Cooked Meal (especially high-tier), Any Cake Ingredients, Vegetables Cooked Meals Sifuu Any Sushi, Any Meat Dish Meat, Foraged Items Cooked Meat Dishes Tamala Any Rare Flower, Any Tea Foraged Herbs, Gatherables Flowers, Tea Tau Any Meat Dish, Any Sushi Meat, Hunting Lures Cooked Meat Dishes Tish Any Furniture (especially crafted), Any Flower Gatherables, Decor Furniture, Flowers Zeki Any Gem, Any Rare Item (e.g., Plushie) Gatherables, Coins Gems, Rare Items

docs.title: Step 1: Stockpile High-Value Gifts
docs.text:
The single fastest way to gain friendship is to always give a "Love" gift. The best universal loves are:

  • Celebration Cake: Loved by almost everyone (Delaila, Kenyatta, Reth, Badruu, etc.).
  • Any Sushi: Loved by Ashura, Hassian, Hodari, Nai'o, Sifuu, Tau.
  • Any Gem (e.g., Emerald, Garnet): Loved by Eshe, Hekla, Jel, Jina, Najuma, Zeki.
  • Heartdrop Lily: Loved by Chayne and required to initiate romance.

Strategy: Focus on cooking high-tier meals. Join a Cake Party to get 50+ Celebration Cakes in one session. Alternatively, check the Palia Fish Database for rare fish locations to make sushi.

docs.title: Step 2: Prioritize Weekly Wants
docs.text:
Every Monday, check each NPC's weekly want. Gifting this item gives 3x the friendship points of a normal liked gift. If the weekly want is also a "Love" item, you get an even bigger boost.

Example: If Delaila's weekly want is "Any Pie" and you give her a Celebration Cake (which is a pie), you get a massive bonus.

docs.title: Step 3: Daily Routine
docs.text:
1. Talk to everyone (takes 5 minutes).
  2. Gift the weekly want to 2-3 NPCs per day (use your best items).
  3. Gift a "Love" item to the remaining NPCs.
  4. Complete quests as they appear. Quests give huge friendship boosts.

docs.title: Step 4: Romance Initiation
docs.text:
Once you reach friendship level 3 with an eligible NPC, you need a Heartdrop Lily to start the romance track. Heartdrop Lilies are rare flowers found in Bahari Bay (especially near the flooded steps) or purchased from the Underground Market (Zeki's secret shop) for 500 Gold each.

Tip: Farm Heartdrop Lilies by planting them in your garden. They take 5 days to grow but can be harvested repeatedly.

Here is every reward you get for reaching each romance level with each NPC.

docs.title: Advanced Strategy: The "Cake Party" Method
docs.text:
This is the most efficient way to max all relationships.

  1. Gather Ingredients: You need Sweet Leaf, Blueberry, Wheat, Egg, Milk, and Butter.
  2. Join a Cake Party: Use the Palia Discord or in-game chat to find a group. Usually, one person provides the ingredients, others provide the fuel (coal) and cooking skills.
  3. Mass Produce: You can make 50-100 Celebration Cakes in one session.
  4. Distribute: Give one Celebration Cake to every NPC who loves it (most of them). This single gift will often jump them from Level 1 to Level 2 instantly.

Pro Tip: Save your Celebration Cakes for NPCs whose weekly want is a "Cooked Dessert" for an even bigger boost.

docs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
docs.text:
Q: Can I lose friendship or romance progress? A: No. Once gained, friendship and romance points never decay. You cannot lose levels.

Q: How many gifts can I give per day? A: You can give one gift per NPC per day (resets at 6:00 AM Palia time).

Q: Do I need to complete quests to progress romance? A: Yes. Each romance level requires completing a specific quest given by the NPC. These quests often involve gathering rare items or cooking specific meals.

Q: Can I date multiple people at once? A: Yes! Palia has no jealousy system. You can romance every eligible NPC simultaneously.

Q: What is the fastest way to get Heartdrop Lilies? A: Plant them in your garden. They are a perennial crop, meaning they regrow after harvest. Also check Zeki's Underground Market daily.

docs.title: Conclusion
docs.text:
Maxing out friendships and romances in Palia is a marathon, not a sprint, but with the right strategy, you can significantly speed up the process. Focus on weekly wants, stockpile high-value cooked meals, and talk to everyone daily. The rewards—from unique outfits to heartwarming cutscenes—are well worth the effort.

Now go out there, make some friends (and lovers), and enjoy all that Palia has to offer!

docs.title: 🏠 Cohabitation & Proudhorn Ceremony (Marriage Equivalent)
docs.text: Once you reach Romance Level 4 with an NPC, you can propose a Proudhorn Ceremony — Palia's equivalent of marriage or civil partnership.

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text: Requirement Detail Romance Level Level 4 with your chosen NPC Proudhorn Antler Crafted from 1 Proudhorn Antler (dropped by Proudhorn sernuks in Bahari Bay) Ceremony Location The gazebo near Kilima Lake Planning Time ~3 in-game days to prepare the ceremony

docs.title: What Cohabitation Unlocks
docs.text: Benefit Detail 🏡 Shared Housing Your partner moves into your home plot (decorates their own room) 🎁 Daily Gifts Your partner leaves gifts for you each morning 💬 Special Dialogue New romantic dialogue and interactions 👨‍👩‍👧 New Quests Cohabitation-specific quest chain 🪑 Unique Furniture Set Exclusive Proudhorn-themed furniture recipe

docs.title: Can You Cohabitate with Multiple NPCs?
docs.text: Palia allows one active cohabitation at a time. However, you can max romance with everyone — the Proudhorn Ceremony is a separate commitment step beyond Romance Level 4. You may break up and choose a different partner later.

docs.title: Breaking Up / Divorce
docs.text:
• No penalty for ending a cohabitation — friendship and romance levels remain intact.
  • Talk to your partner and choose the breakup dialogue option.
  • They move out of your house but remain friendly.

docs.title: Auto-Complete Checklist
docs.text:
Print this checklist and run through it every Monday:

  • [ ] Check all 23 NPCs' weekly wants in the menu
  • [ ] Check your inventory for items matching any weekly want
  • [ ] For "Cooked Meal" wants — check what ingredients you have
  • [ ] For "Fish" wants — visit the relevant fishing spot
  • [ ] For "Gatherable" wants — check Bahari Bay and Kilima
  • [ ] Prioritize NPCs whose weekly want matches their "Love" category
  • [ ] Give the weekly want gift BEFORE any other gift (it's the most efficient use)
